---
Peter,

After Proposition 50 passed and redrew California's congressional boundaries, I had a significant decision to make about where to run.

It was emotional, but ultimately it was an easy choice. I chose home.

**I’m proud to announce that I’m running for Congress in California’s new 41st District** — it’s where I live, raised my son, and have spent my career fighting for working families.

Our communities aren’t defined by lines on a map. They’re defined by the people who live, work, and raise their families here. [_**Before I go on, I hope you’ll take a moment to support my campaign:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119043355/581743938/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-11-10_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmI3YTM1ZS05MWJlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=56huJnHZNirWoKOVze_uubWYitBerPRzfbTsnHgcWQ8=)

With this announcement, I want to take a moment to reintroduce myself.

I’m the proud daughter of Mexican immigrant parents and a lifelong Southern Californian. Before entering public service, I was a labor lawyer fighting abusive corporations and a proud member of the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers. I became the first woman in IBEW history ever elected to Congress.

In Congress, I’ve never been afraid to take on tough battles. I’ve fought to bring jobs back from overseas, strengthen American manufacturing, and ensure our trade deals protect workers — not corporate special interests. And as Chair of BOLD PAC, I’ve worked to expand Latino representation in Congress and uplift working families, women, and immigrants.

That’s the fight I’ll continue to lead in the new 41st District, and I need your help to make it happen.

[_**Will you chip in $5, $25, or whatever you can to power our campaign for the people of California’s 41st District?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119043364/581743948/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-11-10_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmI3YTM1ZS05MWJlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=56huJnHZNirWoKOVze_uubWYitBerPRzfbTsnHgcWQ8=)

Why does being a Democrat so often feel like you start on your own 25-yard line, but Republicans start on your 25 too?
Like, no matter how weak, corrupt, incompetent, cruel, or unpopular the GOP is, Democratic "Leaders" turn them into Bruce Lee and make us fight with one arm and both legs tied behind our backs?
It is exhausting, dispiriting, and strategically stupid. I'll describe the ways the eight Democratic Senators who betrayed their oaths and promises, clearly at the behest of Schumer (I'll explain that too), were dumber than dirt to capitulate now.
Dirt sprinkled with Rush Limbaugh's ashes.
But first, let's make clear that this is one of the big reasons I had the conversation above with Malcolm Nance. It was last Thursday evening.
* * *
### A Congress Of The American Crisis - Malcolm Nance & Cliff Schecter
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a711a243-6c83-460a-96d7-0f2deac72097?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
We discussed a convention--something like The Right's CPAC--but without speakers and an audience resembling characters from _The Hills Have Eyes --_to create a platform that would be like a Project 2027. It, of course, would have a snappier name, like Moon Unit Zappa or CPAC (Constitutional Political Action Committee).
We all come together in s springtime in Philly (no symbolism...great cheesesteaks!) to massively reform institutions that should be in receivership (Supreme Court), create new ones we've lacked (feds, _as part of the Secret Service,_ charged with arresting a President if a judge orders it, so we don't have an OK Corral in the West Wing).
Also, more checks and balances, such as the Attorney General's independence from the President, _by not having the President appoint them_. This would happen via a constitutional amendment to elect AGs separately or appoint them via an independent body. _They 're not the President's lawyer, but "the people's lawyer."_
* * *
Feeling the pinch? Subscribe for free.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.O6TesVATKaWqrbWffkESLK_HsBLmGlggU1W7dntMQI8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=178143634)
* * *
Finally, we would need something akin to a _Truth & Reconciliation Committee_ like South Africa had after apartheid.
We can't just move on after the astonishing corruption, broken laws, besmirched constitutional principles, and acquiescence and/or bribe-taking by electeds, judiciary appointees, corporate media, monopolies, law firms, academic institutions, etc. If you enabled this, and especially if you participated, you don't get to "look forward."
This would ensure our future. But what will ensure _our**today** after our betrayal by eight Senate Democrats and our Democratic Senate "Leader_?"
* * *
### Schumer's Surrender: Democrats Had the Leverage -- and Folded
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/eb137e50-8b45-4f17-b74a-88386a1658d7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
They had every tool. They had the narrative. They were sitting on a shutdown that, paradoxically, was _helping_ them. And, yes, we know Trump was holding back SNAP, but he was doing it illegally, as a court ordered him to disperse the funds.
He is a geriatric serial killer with cerebral gangrene; he will always take a hostage, and if we give in every time, _we all lose._ This should be self-evident.
Yet nothing but lying prone in front of Trump seems to be self-evident to Schumer. So let's do a summary, and if I have to send it to him in crayon because he can't seem to take yes for an answer, sure, why not?
According to _**The Atlantic**_ , the shutdown was actually putting massive pressure on Trump, like his thighs when he does one squat. He was getting blamed, as his cult controls the whole government, the economy is stalling, regular s*t, ya know, **food** , suddenly costs A LOT, and word is the Epstein files will resemble _Debbie Does Dallas_.
* * *
We promise to respect your inbox. Subscribe now.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.O6TesVATKaWqrbWffkESLK_HsBLmGlggU1W7dntMQI8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=178143634)
* * *
So, shockingly, Trump's approval has been crashing, with even Fox finding him at _36%_ , or resembling the warm feelings America has for pubic lice...or Carrot-Top. Hell, the Fox-ers seemed like they were sniffing Gorilla Glue just to get through the past week.
And why was that? Because they had to announce live all night last Tuesday that Trump was getting his electoral arse handed to him in stunning fashion. It's actually quite hard to overstate what happened.
We won the Governor's office in swing Virginia by 16 points, and we won two non-federal statewide races (for public utility officer) _in Georgia by 24 points each_. _We hadn 't won a non-federal statewide race in Georgia since 2006._
New Jersey elected Mikie Sherrill by a whopping 13% even though Democrats were in control of everything locally, and people were in a change kinda mood. Mamdani in New York City...what do you even need to say? Maine voted overwhelmingly to protect voter rights and regulate guns. The list goes on and on and on.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1ee53232-c239-45b0-977a-6b826e7116f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And yet a handful of Senate Democrats, so-called "centrist Democrats," which, if I'm correct, is defined by Merriam Webster as "do you dumb*ss galoots ever try to actually win?," handed a stopgap deal to the GOP anyway. It's literally folding with a straight flush.
_****This is also where we take a second to say there are many great Democrats among our elected officials, and they 're getting better, fighting harder all the time. This is our party, there are more of us, and we will take it from its current flaccid leadership.**_
For example, the grassroots knows where it's at. It's just this shrinking collection of been-there-forever-and-billionaire-funded doofuses who we need to move onto other things. Sadly, as they have seniority, our leadership doesn't represent most of us.
Yet, Dick Durbin is leaving, thank Jeebus. Maybe we could get George W. Bush to call Schumer and see if he can interest him in some painting in the bathtub?
Because it's pretty obvious Schumer planned this betrayal. The tell here, as it were, is that none of the eight defectors were facing re-election in 2026; Two are retiring from the Senate, and the rest magically don't have reelection until 2028 or 2030. Wow, that sounds so unorganized, so spur of the moment!
But wait, there's more! [Julie Roginsky](https://open.substack.com/users/36550640-julie-roginsky?utm_source=mentions) reported that Schumer did it to protect the filibuster, which Trump has been pressuring Republicans to ditch so they can open the government without making any concessions. I'm sorry, but are you f*king kidding me?
I've heard similar rumblings, and as the filibuster is an accident of history. Unconstitutional, as the Constitution makes the Senate a majority-controlled body. It was created by Alexander-Hamilton murdering Aaron Burr.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9e0d1ce7-3c51-4e5e-9090-4aeaee5ea578?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Oh, and it was used to block Civil Rights for 80 years, and by Mitch McConnell to steal the Supreme Court and block everything Democrats have ever wanted to do...
If this is accurate, Chuck Schumer is even a bigger dolt of a leader than I thought he was. But there is a reason beyond what I or Julie have heard to believe this is it. Schumer recruited Maine Governor Janet Mills to get into the Senate race against Susan Collins.
What did Mills promptly say when she got in? She would vote to protect the filibuster. Something virtually every Democrat wants gone. Data points, my friends.
What's more corrosive is how swiftly the fallout is hitting the caucus. Politico reports that nearly every major 2026 Democratic Senate candidate has slammed the deal as a betrayal of the party's base and abdication of leverage just after massive off-year wins.
And it would seem Representative Ro Khanna has come to the same conclusion as I have, Julie has, and just about every other Democrat with a functioning cerebral cortex: that it's Schumer. But we should thank Khanna, because he chose to say it out loud:
"Schumer is no longer effective," said Reps. Ro Khanna and others on X.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a76a4f45-d8db-4f42-a38c-ffa565843b0d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As Khanna rightfully makes clear, this wasn't a moment of strategic flexibility; it was a politically avoidable collapse of will.
Think of it this way, one of the Senators who voted with the eight, Tim Kaine, is from Virginia. Besides winning **everything** there last Tuesday, we won 65 seats in the House of Delegates. That not only blew away our previous record of 54 delegates for Democrats, we now have a supermajority in that body.
What about Pennsylvania? We won three Supreme Court seats on Tuesday overwhelmingly. Oh, and here's a nice little data point: We won the Bucks County, PA District Attorney's race. No biggie, Democrats have won it before. In 1891.
Yeah, that was the last time. Such was our overperformance in Pennsylvania, which John Fetterman betrayed just a few days later to be one of the eight turncoats.
Turns out Fetterman is actually the guy you thought he would be when you first took a look at him.
There are real consequences here. Not dramatic theater, but political arithmetic. Primary challenges, donor realignment, grassroots organizing around accountability. G _overnment workers lost pay for all that time for absolutely nothing_. What an insult.
* * *
Subscribe now and stay in the loop.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.O6TesVATKaWqrbWffkESLK_HsBLmGlggU1W7dntMQI8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=178143634)
* * *
Even the "promise" they got of a vote on Obamacare subsidies from Republican Senate leader John Thune is a joke. They didn't get him to agree to an ironclad vote today. Or tomorrow. Just "sometime in November or December." Gee, Chuck, can you represent the buyer when I choose to sell my house?
Oh, and also, _Mike Johnson didn 't agree to anything_, so the House can just never vote on it. Well done, Schumer, crafty minx, you.
This was a betrayal of leverage and of the people who believed the party would fight. So we need to respond accordingly. As I said, we have all the grassroots energy from the record-breaking No Kings rally two weeks ago to the election last week.
So the response can't just be "well, we'll do better next time." **It** **must** **be** : _we make this painful._ We use independent media and every other leverage point to make the cost of folding higher. To make the internal discipline of those who betray our values visible.
And most of all? We make leadership accountable. We remove Schumer from leadership. Because if Democrats want to have that tsunami election in 2026, which the republic may need to survive, we must move beyond slogans and tweets.
And the only way we do that is by elevating that next generation, those who get it, will fight for it, don't fill their calendar with billionaire dinners. We're so close, my friends.
It's time for us, unlike Chuck Schumer, to close the deal.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1ee53232-c239-45b0-977a-6b826e7116f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/472fb0aa-d2ea-4b64-862b-107434ce5107?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

Honorably retired US Navy Senior Chief, Ukrainian Army Legionnaire presents a dramatically different angle on news and events from the Black Spy's perspective.[Subscribe to Black](https://substack.com/redirect/c928d041-5296-492b-a524-3dc5673fde14?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Peter --
A lot of folks are rightfully frustrated with Democrats in Washington today.
James is, too. He called this “deal” what it is: surrender.
James recently talked about what he’d like to see change within the Democratic Party. He says we need more fighters, not folders, in the U.S. Senate.
[**You can hear him share some hard truths about the party here. If you agree with him, share it to make clear this is the kind of leadership you want to see from Democrats.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/972?t=1&akid=223%2E1347274%2EiLJVAe)

name: Brent Hennrich
subject: They folded. Again.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMU_BeZcmRBr16dPjlrMKhhjiC51ataw3Peft1wIO87ITSxjytRqnk5Se65PvvR0SC1Vi60eIcmGaf4kR6MPJnbRGd2XwIrhDn8ZZ-Z4PPuO0Vx2PdmM8zh_l0Ht__s0eBJX6B-LejGMwrODKO6EywaeHkmlQZTBIctmEflShyozEiwF2LD9eSxFnafqe0JLblplVySsiGWtSUXzrdzIIpDg/4li/XKWiC0TcQoGOAHkYiyNE5Q/h0/h001.8tZUzuTN6ime4rN6rhwpnTosvtq1NWjEzkw0fx5kB9A)
---
Peter,

I'll be straight with you: I'm furious.

Senate Democrats just caved to end the government shutdown. And what did they get for it?

A _promise_ from Senate Republicans to vote on extending ACA tax credits.

Not an actual vote. Not a guarantee. A promise. From Republicans. Who have never kept a promise to the American people in their lives.
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUBm7kOxlJi9KHEXWOeeYuZVxl4bO8HScVfHX1UEMfwJW9_ZCBLkzRUvdZJFsvaJPGgmqmNayMs6X1exU4P6uG74x7myD_559rnEBeIdU7MrOxkX18XbboIiuObo0AK2-UVquBktk4kJGdlmkoSLJIvMGKTzcR2WH3yyS-gw_wHreqATN-4EKBV-rZ_0-1mG1JFu_a3tTczXhWVW2Z7Hxijb4Q9lBE_8FMyFWNof10DztbWmtMCLf1zc-4ACU0WJKP0/4li/XKWiC0TcQoGOAHkYiyNE5Q/h1/h001.sgRg3qtc2YFh8O1wibwAJP7_WbBmcP4WwPiGeYYjKT4)
---
Let me break down what we know about this deal:

**The good:** The federal employees that Trump illegally fired will be reinstated. Workers who've gone over a month without paychecks will finally get their backpay.

SNAP is funded through September 2026. People get to eat, people get paid through the holidays, and air travel can resume.

**The bad:** The continuing resolution has been passed only to temporarily fund the government through January 30th, which means we're back doing this entire circus again in two months.

Democrats got _at most_ a pinky promise from Senate Republicans to vote on the ACA tax credits.

**The ugly:** Speaker Johnson has already said the House won't even entertain a vote on the ACA subsidies. So what good is that Senate promise?

We were at the point of maximum leverage -- sweeping election wins, massive public backlash against the GOP -- and **Democrats GAVE IT ALL UP on the belief that Republicans will keep their word**.

**This is a moment that demands fighters, not folders**.
---
[ **SEND A FIGHTER TO WASHINGTON** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUBm_R6HfrwXVSlFiksTb7mapldpg9F_-OIgBxOB4PCWw2jZvfgJ-j-6er5xVteGaJXn_zF0VNf5a6q1uHRHiabILVCLXLGYQfkyiLhdD8wz4hB3od3CR4DXaEzSExTwueB8tBemkyOVMdCZ7y2MlYS5IAgVu6HlQWuVXc1xmhyme4MWTfMlHfr3R1xkkfhJZzkWezCXx1zcY0bXxUNiM8ziPOKZ93elDkDEZ7LAIG38IOXVqSMdAzVRNJUAxxvRhFo/4li/XKWiC0TcQoGOAHkYiyNE5Q/h2/h001.8lFoHO3Jn6lttiBfIajr5eSrVDeq7KWBd54kEDRaXT0)
---
If you're mad at Senate Democrats for folding today, you should be **even more mad** at representatives like Marie Gluesenkamp Perez.

A Senate deal doesn't mean a House deal. When this resolution comes to the House floor, we already know which way Marie is going to vote.

Marie already told us she'd vote for the Republican bill **2 months ago, before the government even shut down.** She was ready to give up our leverage before we even had it. She'll do it again.

My mother spent her career fighting to expand healthcare access in Oregon. She taught me that when you see people struggling, you fight for them -- you don't fold before the fight even starts. And you sure as hell don't preemptively surrender to the people trying to hurt them.

**WA-3 deserves a representative who understands that.

**That's why I'm running. That's why we're building this movement together. And that's why I need your help right now.

This campaign is about building the kind of representation WA-3 deserves -- someone who will actually fight for working families, not preemptively surrender to Republican demands.

If you're as frustrated as I am, channel that into action.

Marie had a choice, and she chose to side with Republicans before the shutdown even happened. In two months, when we're right back here again, she'll make the same "independent" choice to get along with her Republican friends.

Join us for another edition of our Loneliness to Light Series: The Pet Connection: PetAdoption Event, where we bring the community together to share connection, love, and companionship. Discover your new best friend and learn how pets can help combat loneliness.

📅 Thursday, November 13, 2025
🕓 4–6 PM
📍 Peninsula Humane Society & SPCA
1450 Rollins Rd, Burlingame, CA 94010

Meet adoptable pets, connect with neighbors, and take part in creating a stronger, more connected community.

[RSVP](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=fbb4b68a3b&e=c0babbc643)[ on Eventbrite ](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=f8e86d59fd&e=c0babbc643)or contact 650-363-4572 / mrichardson@smcgov.org.

In Friendship,

David Canepa
San Mateo County Board President

name: Robert Garcia
subject: The most corrupt administration in history.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119044285/581753707/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGIwNTMyYS05M2JlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=seuOAJKRL6cDokIJqXTipwukig8XXyr-jGDndAnc7kk=)
Hi, it’s Congressman Robert Garcia.
I just went live on MSNBC to call out the blatant corruption happening right now inside Donald Trump’s administration — and I’m not going to mince words.
_**This is the most corrupt administration in American history.**_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119044286/581753708/789508428?refcode=251110_RG_corrupt-fr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGIwNTMyYS05M2JlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=seuOAJKRL6cDokIJqXTipwukig8XXyr-jGDndAnc7kk=)
They’re sidelining officials who dared to tell the truth about January 6. They’re rewriting history to protect Trump and his cronies. And they’re spreading lie after lie to cover up the fact that they tried to overturn an election and destroy our democracy.
It’s disgusting. It’s dangerous. And it’s exactly why I’m fighting for transparency in Congress.
Because here’s the truth: **we can’t afford to let this corruption stand.**
→ _Every time_ Trump lies, we _need_ to call it out.
→ _Every time_ his allies abuse power, we _need_ to expose it.
→ _Every time_ they attack the truth, we _need_ to fight back — louder, stronger, and with everything we’ve got.
But calling out corruption isn’t enough — **we have to win elections.** We have to flip the House, defend democracy, and make sure the people writing our laws still believe in the rule of law.
[**So I’m asking: Will you chip in now to help us fight back against Trump’s corruption and keep the truth alive?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119044287/581753709/789508428?refcode=251110_RG_corrupt-fr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGIwNTMyYS05M2JlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=seuOAJKRL6cDokIJqXTipwukig8XXyr-jGDndAnc7kk=)
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119044288/581753710/-309737922?refcode=251110_RG_corrupt-fr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGIwNTMyYS05M2JlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=seuOAJKRL6cDokIJqXTipwukig8XXyr-jGDndAnc7kk=)
We’re building a movement rooted in truth, transparency, and accountability — the exact opposite of what Trump and his enablers stand for.
This fight isn’t easy. But I promise you this: _**I’ll keep calling out the bullshit and the lies every single time.**_ I’ll never back down from defending democracy.
Let’s win this together.
In solidarity,
Robert Garcia
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119044289/581753711/-309737922?refcode=251110_RG_corrupt-fr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGIwNTMyYS05M2JlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=seuOAJKRL6cDokIJqXTipwukig8XXyr-jGDndAnc7kk=)

clean_body: = Hi, it’s Congressman Robert Garcia. I just went live on MSNBC to call out the blatant corruption happening right now inside Donald Trump’s administration — and I’m not going to mince words. This is the most corrupt administration in American history. = They’re sidelining officials who dared to tell the truth about January 6. They’re rewriting history to protect Trump and his cronies. And they’re spreading lie after lie to cover up the fact that they tried to overturn an election and destroy our democracy. It’s disgusting. It’s dangerous. And it’s exactly why I’m fighting for transparency in Congress. Because here’s the truth: we can’t afford to let this corruption stand. → Every time Trump lies, we need to call it out. → Every time his allies abuse power, we need to expose it. → Every time they attack the truth, we need to fight back — louder, stronger, and with everything we’ve got. But calling out corruption isn’t enough — we have to win elections. We have to flip the House, defend democracy, and make sure the people writing our laws still believe in the rule of law. = = We’re building a movement rooted in truth, transparency, and accountability — the exact opposite of what Trump and his enablers stand for. This fight isn’t easy. But I promise you this: I’ll keep calling out the bullshit and the lies every single time. I’ll never back down from defending democracy. Let’s win this together. In solidarity, Robert Garcia = * Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress Robert Garcia for Congress 65 Pine Ave #348 Long Beach, CA 90802 United States This email was sent to . Peter ,
After one of the best Democratic election nights in years, Washington Democrats in the Senate caved last night in one of the most disappointing moves we’ve seen in recent memory.
While most folks were heading to bed, Democratic leadership engineered a surrender that threw away 40 days of leverage on lowering health care costs, and erased so much of the momentum we all felt after last Tuesday’s blue wave.
All year, we’ve been putting our efforts into winning the most critical elections for Democrats with the most cost-effective, data-driven Get Out The Vote program possible. We’re proud to say we’ll even be closing out this year with a PERFECT win record.
But when party leaders fold like this, it hurts all of us who are fighting to keep that momentum alive. It makes it harder to raise the resources we need to keep going, to keep organizing, and to keep winning.
So if you can, please chip in tonight to help us finish the year strong, but if you’re mad right now, we get it. We’re mad, too. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email11102025]

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: I’m in
body:
Stefanik vs. Hochul

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/btJV/?__vbtrk=MzMyODM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMyODM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
**Friend, I’m in.**
I’ve just announced my campaign for Governor of New York.

[ENDORSE ELISE](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/btJV/?__vbtrk=MzMyODM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMyODM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
The tide is turning in the Empire State and the numbers show that voters are ready for a change:

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/btJV/?__vbtrk=MzMyODM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMyODM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/btJV/?__vbtrk=MzMyODM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMyODM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**That’s right.****Recent polling shows me LEADING the worst Governor in America Kathy Hochul, and I am just getting started.**
Fellow patriot, the stakes couldn’t be higher... AOC, Zohran Mamdani, and Kathy Hochul are going to destroy New York **[if we don’t stand and fight to stop them together](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/btJV/?__vbtrk=MzMyODM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMyODM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**.

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/btJV/?__vbtrk=MzMyODM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMyODM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Patriot, that’s where you come in.** I am humbly asking for your Day One Endorsement.

[ENDORSE ELISE](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/btJV/?__vbtrk=MzMyODM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMyODM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
I have a reputation in D.C. for winning hard races, from flipping a deep blue Obama district Republican in my very first campaign, to ousting Liz Cheney from GOP Leadership, I have never backed down from the tough fights that truly matter.
So, I’m asking you to stand with me for one more tough fight.
**_[Please join my campaign with your Day One Endorsement today](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/btJV/?__vbtrk=MzMyODM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMyODM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**

_In Liberty,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/btJV/?__vbtrk=MzMyODM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMyODM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Elise Stefanik**
Proud New Yorker
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/btJV/?__vbtrk=MzMyODM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMyODM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: They shut down the government for this?
body:
Plus: Longtime Keller supporter now backing White - you need to hear this | New for dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=f41402e872&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | |

A U.S. Senator just said something that you need to hear. [We're talking about the government shutdown ](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=3ab32b7874&e=567664f14c)\- the one everyone's blaming on Trump and Republicans. Turns out, that's not what's happening at all.

The math this senator lays out? Absolutely devastating. And here in New Mexico, we're the ones paying for it while our own senators refuse to do anything about it.

**Let's break down what's really going on.**
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=b67dc636c0&e=567664f14c)
| |
🔥 **THE SHUTDOWN SCAM: FOLLOW THE MONEY**
Only 7% of Americans are on Obamacare exchanges. The entire government is shut down over subsidies for those 7%.
A senator just broke down exactly where that money goes - and it's NOT going to patients. Insurance company stocks are up 500-1000% while your premiums keep climbing. We're talking $50 BILLION per year with massive fraud.
Spoiler alert: The senator reveals why 93% of Americans are being held hostage and which party has voted over and over again to keep it that way. The receipts are devastating.
We play the full 2-minute breakdown - you need to hear every word of it.

💰 **NEW MEXICO FOOTS THE BILL**
Right now, 460,000 New Mexicans are waiting on SNAP benefits. Governor calling a special session to make state taxpayers cover federal costs.
And our senators? Martin Heinrich and Ben Ray Luján keep voting to maintain the shutdown.
We expose who's really benefiting from their votes and why they're willing to make New Mexico pay for it.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=290314c460&e=567664f14c)
---
| |
🗳️ **"ENOUGH IS ENOUGH"**
Krysty ran into a longtime Democrat at the grocery store this weekend. This guy raised money for Tim Keller. Supported him for years.
His message now? He's done. Voting for Darren White on December 9th.
We reveal what he said about Keller's third-term run and why longtime supporters are jumping ship. Plus: Why this 50/50 race matters for all of New Mexico.
Albuquerque is #4 most dangerous city in America. Murder rate quadrupled. The change vote is real.
**Support Darren White:** [DarrenWhiteForMayor.com](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=f159b10b47&e=567664f14c)
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=e85bb26e00&e=567664f14c)
---
| | ⚠️ **RED ALERT: ECONOMY KILLING REPUBLICANS**
Virginia and New Jersey weren't just losses - they were blowouts. We break down the polling data that should terrify Republicans heading into 2026.
Trump's response to affordability concerns? We play the clip. And explain why it's a massive problem.
🚨 **THE FILIBUSTER FIGHT**
Trump wants to eliminate the Senate's 60-vote threshold. We reveal why this could backfire catastrophically, what James Carville accidentally admitted about Democrat plans, and Mark's constitutional amendment solution that would force them to show their cards.
This one gets intense.
---
|
---
| | ✅ **LIKE** the episode on [YouTube](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=ea61e55e18&e=567664f14c)[
](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=e5df8002c6&e=567664f14c)
✅ **SUBSCRIBE** to [our channel](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=6c976cf695&e=567664f14c) and hit the 🔔 for updates

✅ **RATE & REVIEW** us on [your favorite podcast platform](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=5adca97e1c&e=567664f14c)

✅ **DONATE** to support independent, fearless commentary at: 🌐 [NoDoubtAboutItPodcast.com](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=786d6df672&e=567664f14c)

Thank you for being part of this community — real talk, real issues, and no spin.

**Mark & Krysty Ronchetti **

name: Scott Peters
subject: We cannot ignore this crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Peters for Congress
body:
---
| | Peter,

We’re now in day 41 of the government shutdown – the longest in American history – and families are paying the price. Federal workers continue to go without pay, essential services are delayed, and uncertainty is growing in every corner of the country.

And here in San Diego, the stakes are even higher. **Unless Congress extends the Affordable Care Act tax credits before they’re set to expire, 28,000 people in CA-50 will see their health care premiums skyrocket.** Families who are already stretching every dollar to cover groceries, rent, and gas _cannot_ afford another blow like this.

[If you agree Congress needs to act immediately to keep health care affordable, add your name here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119044462/581759966/-838101234?refcode2=0a2a9db9-94be-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&refcode=SP_EM_PT_180DO_251110_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTJhOWRiOS05NGJlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ybV1rCnMw4SyAeyrDrV-bHEEmYKUXdPI65d9AFLuQps=&emci=002a9db9-94be-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=0a2a9db9-94be-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=5258741) | | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119044463/581759967/-838101234?refcode2=0a2a9db9-94be-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&refcode=SP_EM_PT_180DO_251110_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTJhOWRiOS05NGJlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ybV1rCnMw4SyAeyrDrV-bHEEmYKUXdPI65d9AFLuQps=&emci=002a9db9-94be-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=0a2a9db9-94be-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=5258741)**
---
Yesterday, the Senate advanced a funding deal that fails to address this problem. After weeks of the GOP refusing to negotiate a bipartisan solution, we still don’t have a plan that protects working families from higher costs. And without any assurances that the President will follow appropriations law, there is no guarantee these funds would even be used as Congress directs.

San Diegans deserve stability, and they deserve a government that keeps their health care affordable. They shouldn’t be asked to trust a process that has already failed them once, and they should _not_ carry the burden of political dysfunction.

**When the House finally returns to session for a vote, I’ll be voting no on any deal that doesn’t protect families here at home. The stakes are too high to settle for a bill that leaves people behind.**

[Stand with me and call on Congress to stop premiums from skyrocketing and protect affordable health care for San Diego families.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119044464/581759968/-838101234?refcode2=0a2a9db9-94be-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&refcode=SP_EM_PT_180DO_251110_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTJhOWRiOS05NGJlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ybV1rCnMw4SyAeyrDrV-bHEEmYKUXdPI65d9AFLuQps=&emci=002a9db9-94be-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=0a2a9db9-94be-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=5258741) | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119044465/581759969/-838101234?refcode2=0a2a9db9-94be-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&refcode=SP_EM_PT_180DO_251110_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTJhOWRiOS05NGJlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ybV1rCnMw4SyAeyrDrV-bHEEmYKUXdPI65d9AFLuQps=&emci=002a9db9-94be-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=0a2a9db9-94be-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=5258741)**
---
Thank you for staying informed and engaged,

Scott

name: Katie Porter
subject: We made Trump cave
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
They’re banning private jets from 12 major airports.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40398%2E3422442%2EUjbPtN)
JUST IN, Peter: **Trump CAVES after we called him out for letting billionaires keep their private jets flying while thousands of commercial flights are canceled.**
Yesterday, Secretary of Transportation Sean Duffy couldn’t answer my simple question when asked on Fox News: _why are billionaire private jets still flying while Trump is canceling commercial flights?_
**Now, they’re banning private jets from 12 major airports.** Fighting back WORKS. This is why we need our next Governor in California to be a leader who won’t back down.
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251110_1_ak.0wuLEb&refcode=em20251110-40398&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40398%2E3422442%2EUjbPtN)
But 12 airports is not enough—and there's no way Donald Trump is going to stop his cronies like Elon Musk or his own family from taking private flights.
The Trump Administration should ground _every private jet_ that takes time and resources from our overworked air traffic controllers until commercial flights are back at full capacity.
I won’t stop fighting on behalf of all Americans until we have a President who works for us—not the billionaires and corporate CEOs.
**[But not every candidate in our race has the grit to stand up to Trump like I do, and they are going to spend big to try and defeat us. Can you chip in $5 to our campaign today so we can keep holding Trump accountable and fighting for Californians?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251110_1_ak.0wuLEb&refcode=em20251110-40398&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=40398%2E3422442%2EUjbPtN)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251110_1_ak.0wuLEb&refcode=em20251110-40398&t=23&akid=40398%2E3422442%2EUjbPtN)
Thank you,
Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251110-40398&amounts=&t=24&refcode2=40398_3422442_UjbPtN&akid=40398%2E3422442%2EUjbPtN)**

name: Pramila Jayapal (via LeftNet)
subject: Plans for 11/16?
body:
[1]LeftNet

Hi,

I’m furious — and I know you are too.

If you’ve been feeling overwhelmed — that’s by design. The Trump
administration wants you disoriented and powerless. But you are not. When
we come together, nothing can stop us.

That’s why I created the Resistance Lab: training built for this moment.
[ https://act.leftnet.org/go/22040?t=1001&akid=1339%2E2118727%2ErEZyCs ]Join us online on November 16 to learn how to fight back, push through
the noise, challenge authoritarianism, and build real power together.

SIGN UP NOW

Now is the time to stand together against injustice. The Resistance Lab
was developed with experts who have studied democratic backsliding around
the world. We draw from many different toolkits that we know work in
anti-authoritarian movements.

[ https://act.leftnet.org/go/22040?t=1002&akid=1339%2E2118727%2ErEZyCs ]Sign up today, and let’s build the resistance together!

In strength,

Pramila Jayapal

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.leftnet.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1339%2E2118727%2ErEZyCs

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: Not a typo
body:
---
Derek, it’s been a big week for Democrats in every corner of the country. Just look at these states:
* In Virginia, Abigail Spanberger was elected the first woman governor of the Commonwealth with over 57 percent of the vote.
* In New Jersey, Mikie Sherrill won her race for governor with more than 56 percent of the vote.
* In New York City, Zohran Mamdani was elected mayor with over a million votes.
* In Pennsylvania, voters chose to retain three State Supreme Court Justices, with each receiving more than 61 percent of the vote.
* In California, voters approved Prop 50 with nearly 64 percent of the vote.

**No, none of these stats are a typo.** In states and cities nationwide, Democrats dominated in races up and down the ballot. On Tuesday night, voters sent a clear message to Trump and his allies: _We’re done with your attacks on our democracy and our economy, and we’re coming for Congress next._ At the DNC, we’ve spent 2025 organizing across the country, we’ve invested millions in state Democratic parties, and we’ve talked to voters in the bluest of blue and the reddest of red districts to make sure they are hearing Democrats’ message. **But here’s the truth: The work is just beginning. If we want to win back Congress next year and the White House in 2028, we can’t slow down now.** [**Derek, the work we did this year was only possible with the help of grassroots supporters just like you. If you’re fired up and ready to keep this momentum going, please consider giving $7 to the DNC today →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?amount=7&refcode=em_20251110_5211_fr&refcode2=5211_22930333_bLoCfb&akid=5211%2E22930333%2EbLoCfb) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251110_5211_fr&refcode2=5211_22930333_bLoCfb&akid=5211%2E22930333%2EbLoCfb)**

Friend,

We need to have an honest conversation about who we allow into our country.

**Let me introduce you to Zohran Mamdani, the new SOCIALIST mayor of New York City.**
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=da32a3fb72234a2394770281feabe60a&_e=TLN9dRoKvsGbmO_LCrE9m2U4vSx_-G-HZJRYo4sJVey_lljbohY_-xzrw46HoCXhIuf0vNQOHEaDYyHI2Pm9l3LjlqErUR84rTlJe0hB1i4x06eHSgun2ZtI60XHOtco0bwmur1ps_gSIa1xf0JNQDMERfO42CUMMrbzsJyp6V3wuwpzm64dz1XetZL8gSzUzHQKSH6v3yy0FJfIPEB3yomaXIV5pPyRP--k-uylbKDMDuv7rJVSCON8u9KBFuIVlitFsfS4lcRJNrVRheyIrBo1BwGcCcqUo5m6EAagCB5_4YVfNjolvqTj_ipDIw6SvMNdUEfUrf84TighPpD_aE_oe95bKjbB2WO7BEbqWKNfdk987K471dIdOrYJ50p7uzuRa66cHEe_qLqw9FCZVjbjRwJCOE5f9_W-aKh-nyH74pEnNU11kmzIctV7EjXoFhe6bv-OLx2r1jjJqkqGz_MWJXZZe026-cIZ7z0xj-YHgAxbG5N_sO0UdsOpn4tLukIy7ZCZBH_hVmJLmo7Kkf8-333T7AQkSpCa5HJM_jRotzOCa4T95WjFuDSK4onTKtsAVCWNRj9keQM5ekzP7w%3D%3D)
Charlie had Mamdani pegged from Day 1. He knew that, despite his attempts to portray himself as a modern Western man, Mamdani was nothing more than a dangerous radical, hell-bent on devastating New York City with policies straight out of _The Communist Manifesto_.

A self-declared socialist, Mamdani wants to "globalize the intifada" and import values into the West that will destroy New York City and destabilize our civilization.

_Everything about him runs counter to America First_.

**The fact that he WON in arguably America 's greatest city proves that, while we won Congress and the White House, _the fight for the heart, soul, and future of America still rages on_.**

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee's name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

clean_body: Friend, We need to have an honest conversation about who we allow into our country. Let me introduce you to Zohran Mamdani, the new SOCIALIST mayor of New York City. Charlie had Mamdani pegged from Day 1. He knew that, despite his attempts to portray himself as a modern Western man, Mamdani was nothing more than a dangerous radical, hell-bent on devastating New York City with policies straight out of The Communist Manifesto. A self-declared socialist, Mamdani wants to "globalize the intifada" and import values into the West that will destroy New York City and destabilize our civilization. Everything about him runs counter to America First. The fact that he WON in arguably America 's greatest city proves that, while we won Congress and the White House, the fight for the heart, soul, and future of America still rages on. I really don't think that Republicans losing two off-year elections in states that President Trump lost is a great indicator of 2026. Democrats and the media want to demoralize you and our base, but there's no reason to be discouraged. But last week _did_ serve as a reminder that Democrats will do **ANYTHING** to beat us! That’s why we’re not taking anything for granted. Winning a campaign is not easy or cheap – **so we're getting to work! ** clean_body: Americans support the MAGA agenda| | | | | My friend, The lamestream media is already calling this the end of the Republican comeback because Democrats won in New Jersey and Virginia. Give me a break. I really don't think that Republicans losing two off-year elections in states that President Trump lost is a great indicator of 2026. Democrats and the media want to demoralize you and our base, but there's no reason to be discouraged. But last week did serve as a reminder that Democrats will do ANYTHING to beat us! That’s why we’re not taking anything for granted. Winning a campaign is not easy or cheap – so we're getting to work! Thanks for having my back, Glenn Grothman U.S. Congressman (WI-06) | | FOLLOW GLENN ON SOCIAL MEDIA! | | | | ---|---|---|--- Glenn Grothman for Congress P.O. Box 1215 Fond du Lac, WI 54936 You are receiving this email because you expressed an interest in Glenn Grothman.

name: Roy Cooper
subject: A deal without health care protections is no deal at all
body:
It’s a nonstarter.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1898?t=1&akid=41%2E124072%2Em_ccqd)
Peter — Washington politicians should never have played politics with our health care. The GOP plan to raise health care costs on millions of Americans is ridiculous, and it’s time for elected officials to stop playing petty political games and _do their jobs._ Any deal that drives up health care costs is a nonstarter. **[As the next Democratic Senator from North Carolina, I will do everything in my power to protect health care for all Americans. Just like I did as Governor. But I need you with me, Peter — pitch in now to help me flip this seat from red to blue and take back the U.S. Senate from the extreme GOP.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1935?t=6&akid=41%2E124072%2Em_ccqd)** Look, too many working families are already struggling. Surging health care costs will break the bank for even more. But it doesn’t have to be this way. **Instead of cutting taxes for billionaires, Washington could make health care more affordable and accessible — not to mention fund our public schools, invest in job training, and help bring down the high cost of housing.** When I was Governor of North Carolina, we focused on this and more — because I believe that our government should work for _all_ of us. Not just the wealthy and well-connected. It’s time for Washington to do the same. **[If you’re as fed up as I am, I need you to donate any amount that fits in your budget to help us win this toss-up race. It’s the key to taking back the Senate and turning this country around.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1935?t=7&akid=41%2E124072%2Em_ccqd)** | **[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1935?t=8&akid=41%2E124072%2Em_ccqd)**
---
I appreciate it,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1935?t=9&akid=41%2E124072%2Em_ccqd)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=2&akid=41%2E124072%2Em_ccqd)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=3&akid=41%2E124072%2Em_ccqd)
---

[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=5&akid=41%2E124072%2Em_ccqd)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

**I was never supposed to be President.**
---
I was never supposed to survive the bullet of an assassin, **BUT I DID.** I was never supposed to be President of the United States again, **BUT I AM.** I was never supposed to Make America Great Again, **BUT I WILL NEVER SURRENDER!** The great behemoth known as the Democrat Party threw everything at me: Hoaxes, Witch Hunts, Impeachments, Election Interference, Raids, Arrests, and so much more! But the steady compass of Faith has guided my hands through it all. NOW, the government is completely shut down, and they want **MAGA TO BE DONE.** _We can’t take our foot off the gas!_ I was saved for this one reason: to Make America Great Again. I was made for this, **BUT MAGA IS POWERED BY YOU.** _That’s why I’ve launched a 24 HOUR TRUMP FUNDRAISING BLITZ, and I’m asking everyone to chip in $15 to make it one for the record books!_ Every time they count us out – count YOU out – we come back bigger, better, and stronger than ever before. body:
CNN: Inside Trump’s gutting of the Justice Department unit that enforces voting laws| | |
---
On her first day as attorney general, Pam Bondi penned a memo requiring DOJ lawyers to “ _zealously_ ” advocate for administration positions or face disciplinary action and potential firing. **It's clear we can no longer depend on the office that was created to defend our rights to actually defend them anymore.** **[That's why we need your help, folks: RUSH $25 or more right now to help us protect your right to vote and so much more>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119044935/581778963/1498593520?refcode=111025_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1YTZkYWJkLTk5YmUtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMjI0ODIzZmY5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t_DMSxRm-U_GvTNWnK18bmGVE84SndgaW_9fSyXj20Y=)**

Folks, what's happening is so clear: Trump and his MAGA cronies are fundamentally transforming our Department of Justice and **turning it into a tool for undermining voting rights, not protecting them.** Under his watch, the DOJ and its Civil Rights Division -- _once lauded as the "crown jewel" of the Justice Department_ \-- has **abandoned its nonpartisan mission of defending the freedom to vote.** Instead, it’s targeting election officials, amplifying debunked voter fraud claims, and trying to intimidate states into giving election data. Voter Action Project was founded in 2020 to fight for the use of mail-in ballots under a hostile Trump administration during a global pandemic. **We're still fighting right now, working every day to protect our fundamental right to vote** under yet another vicious administration that's looking to trample all over American citizens and our ability to make our voice heard through our elections. **[In the face of escalating attacks on our right to vote, increasing amounts of voter disinformation, and voter intimidation tactics on the rise – will you stand with us and chip in $25 today to help us defend voting rights?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119044938/581778979/1498593520?refcode=111025_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1YTZkYWJkLTk5YmUtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMjI0ODIzZmY5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t_DMSxRm-U_GvTNWnK18bmGVE84SndgaW_9fSyXj20Y=)**

clean_body: CNN: Inside Trump’s gutting of the Justice Department unit that enforces voting laws| | | On her first day as attorney general, Pam Bondi penned a memo requiring DOJ lawyers to “ zealously ” advocate for administration positions or face disciplinary action and potential firing. It's clear we can no longer depend on the office that was created to defend our rights to actually defend them anymore. = | | | = Folks, what's happening is so clear: Trump and his MAGA cronies are fundamentally transforming our Department of Justice and turning it into a tool for undermining voting rights, not protecting them. Under his watch, the DOJ and its Civil Rights Division -- once lauded as the "crown jewel" of the Justice Department \-- has abandoned its nonpartisan mission of defending the freedom to vote. Instead, it’s targeting election officials, amplifying debunked voter fraud claims, and trying to intimidate states into giving election data. Voter Action Project was founded in 2020 to fight for the use of mail-in ballots under a hostile Trump administration during a global pandemic. We're still fighting right now, working every day to protect our fundamental right to vote under yet another vicious administration that's looking to trample all over American citizens and our ability to make our voice heard through our elections. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | | We've tried to keep you updated on what's going on at DOJ under Trump , to make every American aware of MAGA's relentless campaign, executed by the department’s political leaders, to smear the work of the longtime attorneys, dismiss noncontroversial cases, and reassign career supervisors. But the gutting of the section during Trump’s second administration goes far beyond that, according to former department attorneys and outside voter advocates." name: Chris Pappas
subject: Why I’m a no
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=3408%2E582294%2EDUdjpv)
I want you to hear this from me: I won’t support a deal that allows health care costs to skyrocket for families and small businesses across the country. **Full stop.**
This has been the longest government shutdown in history, and instead of working toward a deal, Speaker Johnson has kept the House closed since September. Donald Trump continues to gut vital services, and at this moment, he is fighting in court to block SNAP payments for hungry children, proving that he does not care about lowering costs for working families.
This fight has always been about keeping health care costs from skyrocketing and making life more affordable for Granite Staters. That’s still my focus, and that’s why I’ll be a no on this deal.
**[I’m running for Senate because we need to stand up to Donald Trump’s unchecked power and fight to protect working families. If you’re with me, please consider supporting my campaign for U.S. Senate.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251110_2_shutdown.k7Fzmc&refcode=em20251110-2&t=2&akid=3408%2E582294%2EDUdjpv)**

clean_body: I want you to hear this from me: I won’t support a deal that allows health care costs to skyrocket for families and small businesses across the country. Full stop. This has been the longest government shutdown in history, and instead of working toward a deal, Speaker Johnson has kept the House closed since September. Donald Trump continues to gut vital services, and at this moment, he is fighting in court to block SNAP payments for hungry children, proving that he does not care about lowering costs for working families. This fight has always been about keeping health care costs from skyrocketing and making life more affordable for Granite Staters. That’s still my focus, and that’s why I’ll be a no on this deal. Thank you for standing with me, Chris Pappas New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Trump just doesn’t care
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
All he cares about is tax cuts for billionaires and cashing in on the presidency. And honestly, I’m stunned my Republican colleagues don’t seem to care, either.
#

Folks, Mark Kelly here.
I voted no yesterday.
I voted no because I have spent the last month working for solutions with Republicans and this Administration — to try to reopen the government and keep health care costs from spiking for Americans.
I voted no because no family should have to choose between putting food on the table and their health care.
I voted no because Donald Trump proved who he cares about when he spent more time demoing the White House to build a ballroom than negotiating to reopen the government, and literally went to court to block food assistance for hungry families.
Over the last month, Trump has proven he doesn’t care about rising costs, skyrocketing health care, or working families struggling to put food on the table. All he cares about is tax cuts for billionaires and cashing in on the presidency. And honestly, I’m stunned my Republican colleagues don’t seem to care, either.
I haven’t stopped fighting for the families who are going broke or hungry because Trump and the GOP refuse to compromise.
I haven’t stopped, and I will not stop. But I want to know where you’re at on this, so here’s a question:
[**Are you with me? Do you think we should keep fighting for better, more affordable health care? If you are, I want you to sign your name so I know we’ve got allies in this fight.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-nov25-fight/?source=em251110-1-8k&akid=6241%2E6688874%2EC1Um7S)
**[SIGN ON](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-nov25-fight/?source=em251110-1-8k&akid=6241%2E6688874%2EC1Um7S)**
If Trump or any of my Republican colleagues are ready to get serious on solutions, I’m ready to work.
Until then, I’m not giving up.
Thanks for sticking with me,
Mark

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=6241%2E6688874%2EC1Um7S).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

* **[00:18:45]** The decoy account that exposed the scale of child exploitation on Instagram
* **[00:29:34]** What Congress must do now: Raul's vision for a digital bill of civil rights

name: David Hogg
subject: What the hell just happened in the Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Let me make something clear, Peter:
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251110-1&t=1&akid=2826%2E587540%2ER9_1qV)
Peter, the establishment has had plenty to say about Leaders We Deserve. They have criticized our approach and said we shouldn’t primary incumbent Democrats in safe seats.
But last night, Democrats demonstrated exactly why our mission matters so much:
[](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251110_1_shutdown.xCXdzn&refcode=em20251110-2826&amount=5&t=3&akid=2826%2E587540%2ER9_1qV)
Despite having public approval on their side and the momentum of an electorate that just repudiated Donald Trump and the GOP on Election Day, **Senate Democrats caved last night.**
The majority of these Democrats were older, retiring, and/or not up for reelection in 2026. It’s safe to say this was all a part of the Democratic establishment’s plan to let them fall on the sword.
And what did they get in exchange for this “deal?” Nothing. Just a brutal tradeoff that forces millions of Americans into an impossible choice: pay skyrocketing healthcare premiums that have doubled or even tripled overnight — or lose access entirely to the care they depend on.
Healthcare is one of the only issues voters both trust Democrats more on AND say is one of their top 5 voting issues. And what did we just do? Give voters even less of a reason to vote for us or trust us. Democrats said they were fighting to prevent your insurance rates from skyrocketing and what did they just do? Give up. After a month of doing one of the only things in their power to hold Trump accountable, they agreed to a deal that gives our side literally nothing and still will see Americans' cost of healthcare go up by thousands of dollars.
At a time when people are already stretched thin trying to afford medicine, rent, and groceries, these Senate Democrats just sent a cruel and unmistakable message: your health, your survival, _you_ — just aren’t worth fighting for. Not to them. Not when it really counts.
**Let me make something clear, Peter: Leaders We Deserve exists because our country desperately needs a new generation of progressive leaders in power.**
We need leaders who won’t sell us down the river because they’re too weak and ineffective to do the jobs they were elected to do. We need leaders who know what’s at stake, who are ready and willing to fight like hell, and who have the energy and creativity to find _real solutions_ instead of just caving to Trump.
That’s why we're primarying asleep-at-the-wheel Democratic incumbents, helping flip the House, and fighting to win back state legislatures in 2026. We challenge Dems in safe seats, not because it makes us popular in DC (it definitely doesn’t!), but because it’s the one thing we haven’t tried at scale. In case this has not made it clear enough, our party doesn't have a messaging problem; it has a COWARDICE problem, it has a MESSENGER problem. We aren’t here just to tell voters to vote for Democrats because we _aren’t_ Republicans. Leaders We Deserve is here to build a party that tells voters to vote for Democrats because they _are_ Democrats, and as such they aren’t a party of folders, they’re a party of fighters. Fighters against special interests like the insurance lobby, big pharma, and all the other lobbies that have made life so much harder in this country. That won’t change until we build a culture in our party that shows if you fold on something as important as 22 million Americans’ healthcare, you will be challenged.
I am tired of asking young people to have faith in a party that increasingly fails to prove why we should believe in it anymore. That’s why we do this work. Not because it’s easy but because it is necessary to help get our party and country back on track by building a party of fighters for the people's interests NOT special interests. That's why we count on you to support us because we have never and will never take corporate money.
Are you with us, Peter?
**[Pitch in $5 to help us elect new Democrats who will actually fight for us.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251110_1_shutdown.xCXdzn&refcode=em20251110-2826&amount=5&t=4&akid=2826%2E587540%2ER9_1qV)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251110_1_shutdown.xCXdzn&amount=5&refcode=em20251110-2826&t=23&akid=2826%2E587540%2ER9_1qV)**
We’re not giving up on the fight for the future. **_We just need stronger fighters._**
Thank you for your support,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20251110-1&t=24&refcode2=2826_587540_R9_1qV&akid=2826%2E587540%2ER9_1qV)**

They have criticized our approach and said we shouldn’t primary incumbent Democrats in safe seats. But last night, Democrats demonstrated exactly why our mission matters so much: Despite having public approval on their side and the momentum of an electorate that just repudiated Donald Trump and the GOP on Election Day, Senate Democrats caved last night. The majority of these Democrats were older, retiring, and/or not up for reelection in 2026. It’s safe to say this was all a part of the Democratic establishment’s plan to let them fall on the sword. And what did they get in exchange for this “deal?” Nothing. Just a brutal tradeoff that forces millions of Americans into an impossible choice: pay skyrocketing healthcare premiums that have doubled or even tripled overnight — or lose access entirely to the care they depend on. Healthcare is one of the only issues voters both trust Democrats more on AND say is one of their top 5 voting issues. And what did we just do? Give voters even less of a reason to vote for us or trust us. Democrats said they were fighting to prevent your insurance rates from skyrocketing and what did they just do? Give up. After a month of doing one of the only things in their power to hold Trump accountable, they agreed to a deal that gives our side literally nothing and still will see Americans' cost of healthcare go up by thousands of dollars. At a time when people are already stretched thin trying to afford medicine, rent, and groceries, these Senate Democrats just sent a cruel and unmistakable message: your health, your survival, you — just aren’t worth fighting for. Not to them. Not when it really counts. Let me make something clear, Peter: Leaders We Deserve exists because our country desperately needs a new generation of progressive leaders in power. We need leaders who won’t sell us down the river because they’re too weak and ineffective to do the jobs they were elected to do. We need leaders who know what’s at stake, who are ready and willing to fight like hell, and who have the energy and creativity to find real solutions instead of just caving to Trump. That’s why we're primarying asleep-at-the-wheel Democratic incumbents, helping flip the House, and fighting to win back state legislatures in 2026. We challenge Dems in safe seats, not because it makes us popular in DC (it definitely doesn’t!), but because it’s the one thing we haven’t tried at scale. In case this has not made it clear enough, our party doesn't have a messaging problem; it has a COWARDICE problem, it has a MESSENGER problem. We aren’t here just to tell voters to vote for Democrats because we aren’t Republicans. Leaders We Deserve is here to build a party that tells voters to vote for Democrats because they are Democrats, and as such they aren’t a party of folders, they’re a party of fighters. Fighters against special interests like the insurance lobby, big pharma, and all the other lobbies that have made life so much harder in this country. That won’t change until we build a culture in our party that shows if you fold on something as important as 22 million Americans’ healthcare, you will be challenged. I am tired of asking young people to have faith in a party that increasingly fails to prove why we should believe in it anymore. That’s why we do this work. Not because it’s easy but because it is necessary to help get our party and country back on track by building a party of fighters for the people's interests NOT special interests. That's why we count on you to support us because we have never and will never take corporate money. Are you with us, Peter? We’re not giving up on the fight for the future. We just need stronger fighters. Thank you for your support, David Hogg

body:
I wanted to reach out personally...

Friend, I wanted to reach out personally to check in.
How are you holding up? And more importantly, how do you feel about the direction our country is going right now?
Your feedback helps me take the pulse of real Conservatives who care deeply about America's future. I'd appreciate your quick thoughts in this month's November Pulse Check. name: Bowel Release
subject: A Doctor's Secret to Easy Complete Relief
body:
One minute you’re straining as hard as you can...
| | | We are a community of gun-loving Americans.
We hope you stick around but remember you can [unsubscribe](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/22159/6374453/a5f035ad8afa7589abc03864170ed401c7c4b1c0/dc269fdfb86b523c1e4c9dc57e0a03fb01900826) here at any time.
---
[](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/22159/6374453/2475bd73ef61f09ba4b23f2e21dabfe820a6c5d0/dc269fdfb86b523c1e4c9dc57e0a03fb01900826)

November 11th, 2025 at 02:19 PM UTC
---
|
---
Dear Subscriber,

My cousin is an EMT and says he finds people all the time who just pass out and die on the toilet from straining too hard while pooping. Straining can cause an aneurysm (when blood vessels pop in your brain). It also creates a rush of blood flow, which can knock plaque free in veins leading to heart attack or stroke. One minute you’re straining as hard as you can... The next minute, your arms go cold and you feel lightheaded as your body hits the floor.
Most people usually don’t get help in time because they lock the bathroom door, so no one can get in to help. This is why I tell people NEVER to strain when pooping.
If you’ve been having trouble pooping, you need to address the root cause as soon as possible. A top gut MD recommends doing this instead of straining: **[7-second poop ritual flushes out bowels fast](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/22159/6374453/2475bd73ef61f09ba4b23f2e21dabfe820a6c5d0/dc269fdfb86b523c1e4c9dc57e0a03fb01900826)**

A study showed it helped people poop TWICE as often. With results in as little as 1 week. And it was effective for an un-heard of 98% of people who tried it. Best of all, they enjoyed a noticeably flatter tummy after flushing out 10 to 15 pounds of old stuck poop. Tracey C. from Frazeysburg, OH said “I was able to get a full release the same day. Now I’m going number two like clockwork and I feel so much lighter, energized and comfortable all day!”
---

name: Troy Downing
subject: Honoring the men and women who defend our country.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
To all who have selflessly served: Thank you.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDg4MjgxNTEsImUiOiJtZy1lbmM6NWh6RDRoYmhSOTR0SVViRGFVQXlzUGowaHcxSkVGa0EiLCJyaSI6IjI4OTktZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJycSI6IjAyLWIyNTMxNS01YTAzMmQ3OGJkNzI0NGFiOTFlOGNjZDg1MmU3NWQ3ZSIsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJ0cm95ZG93bmluZy5jb20_ZXhfdGlkPTIwMjUxMTExX1pXLTJCLjExMDExN190MTc0OTA0OS0yODk5JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MTExMV9aVy0yQi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NDkwNDktMjg5OSJ9/e-C8xIDRsuQfN13JQkAA2Q)Peter,

Today, we honor the extraordinary men and women who have made the sacrifice to defend our country. As a Nation, we owe a profound debt to our service members and their families. To all who have selflessly served: **Thank you.** As a combat veteran with two deployments to Afghanistan, I understand the sacrifices made in service. Veterans Day is a poignant reminder of the courage and resilience of those who have served, as well as the families who support them.

As your Congressman, I pledge to fight to provide our veterans with the care, resources, and respect they deserve. Their commitment is the price of our freedom and a testament to the enduring spirit of America.

May God bless our veterans, our military, and the United States of America.

Very respectfully,[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDg4MjgxNTEsImUiOiJtZy1lbmM6NWh6RDRoYmhSOTR0SVViRGFVQXlzUGowaHcxSkVGa0EiLCJyaSI6IjI4OTktZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJycSI6IjAyLWIyNTMxNS01YTAzMmQ3OGJkNzI0NGFiOTFlOGNjZDg1MmU3NWQ3ZSIsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJ0cm95ZG93bmluZy5jb20_ZXhfdGlkPTIwMjUxMTExX1pXLTJCLjExMDExN190MTc0OTA0OS0yODk5JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MTExMV9aVy0yQi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NDkwNDktMjg5OSJ9/JX-3h8FkdTpubHk-4gXbTQ)Troy Downing,
USAF/ANG| |

name: George Moraitis for Congress
subject: Honor and sacrifice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by George Moraitis for Congress Committee
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://km78svhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XO7Z9GiofFvxemHKiHFOVSbGDejvdRKsz_4j2ensn-aGbNEgH2Fx_mEld5lZgkNRtlUMOxu7Z_VPmPAGdQBJZNQcmAIboDwkTTCq84dPkDr6dmMOYl_FZ54nFkyW7Qi0evKciHCHfGn3WT1PvfZ2Vt1_nE-1bHFm&c=lEP3Ja8Jaqa5la2Bk8Uoqmup9hfdZCMwVGMNd2Ve_ZTbIs4Q_4xnkA==&ch=QicZ5UmHnOrzrN3uWQreKeUvMCUpeNfzTBc0HII6vwDvaJOIFlE-vg==)
---
---
|
# AMERICA FIRST. NAVY VETERAN.
# PROVEN LEADER.
---
| |
---
---
| Dear Peter,
Today we pause to honor the brave men and women who have worn our nation's uniform. We remember their sacrifice that has kept America free.
My grandfather came to this country seeking opportunity and went on to attend the U.S. Naval Academy. I continued his legacy by attending the U.S. Naval Academy and I was proud to serve our nation aboard a fast attack nuclear submarine.
In 2014, my father and I attended the 70th anniversary celebration of D-Day in France. Standing on the beaches of Normandy and visiting the graves of more than 9,000 fallen Americans, reminded me that freedom has a price and it's one paid by our veterans and their families.
On this Veterans Day, let us give thanks for their courage, their sacrifice, and the ideals they defended. May God bless our veterans, their families, and the United States of America.
Sincerely, George
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
---
|

clean_body: | | | | | == | AMERICA FIRST. NAVY VETERAN. PROVEN LEADER. | | | Dear Peter, Today we pause to honor the brave men and women who have worn our nation's uniform. We remember their sacrifice that has kept America free. My grandfather came to this country seeking opportunity and went on to attend the U.S. Naval Academy. I continued his legacy by attending the U.S. Naval Academy and I was proud to serve our nation aboard a fast attack nuclear submarine. In 2014, my father and I attended the 70th anniversary celebration of D-Day in France. Standing on the beaches of Normandy and visiting the graves of more than 9,000 fallen Americans, reminded me that freedom has a price and it's one paid by our veterans and their families. On this Veterans Day, let us give thanks for their courage, their sacrifice, and the ideals they defended. May God bless our veterans, their families, and the United States of America. Sincerely, George | | | | | | | | | | == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- | FOLLOW US ON SOCIAL MEDIA FOR UPDATES! | == == == == mailto:info@george4congress.com | | == | == | == | == | == | == | | | | == | Paid for by George Moraitis for Congress Committee | | | | George Moraitis for Congress | 1103 Hays Street | Tallahassee, FL 32301 US | | | | | | |

# **[Obamacare allows insurers to profit during shutdown at taxpayers' expense](http://trk.libertyledger.)**

# **[Nevada's two female senators explain their support for ending shutdown](http://trk.libertyledger.)**

Jacky Rosen, D-Nevada, to join seven fellow Democrats and one independent to vote to end America’s longest federal government shutdown. subject: Shutdown Next Step, New Trump Pardons, and The Swedish Prescription
body:
House Speaker Mike Johnson has [called all members back to Washington, D.C.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuhDAQRL_GdCB7MZwpXKShu7QpkYH14cjYFl7Oub-POClfkC22Gc0bzXzdp7tx3oXHp9lRk41TwJI9EuEx5e2kNZYQ8IcyYQpY6Dj3lCbg0NVC1EJMq3H-Nclq1RYRsK1Qi1sPqhu4gmrTrV25VZK3FsxtVlL13cCHTvJBGuhVWzl90cT7uJTQqL7jEhYOdjbzogYmOa6O4tF8RxdoQ-tf8YlHs8S98nojSpm1HwxGBmMppVnCvFwig_FCMxiFuB5nMD4uZ9gxUP1Xrz4wnbN3iwm5zhgMYb3FM2Odg0nNRruvDr2m4rx3ub8xyR-7cf6dT_8a7anhNwAA__-6WIDz), for a vote on the Senate’s deal to end the 41-day government shutdown, the longest in U.S. history.
