clean_body: People are saying you have to “see it to believe it...” and they’re right. | | | | | = Hi Peter, National studies continue to rank Oklahoma as one of the worst states (if not THE worst state) for women. Oklahoma has the highest rates of domestic violence and the worst maternal death rates nationwide. They have one of the strictest abortion bans in the country, with no exceptions for rape or incest. Most recently, in the aftermath of Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill,” more than half of Oklahoma's rural hospitals are at risk of closing. Despite all of that, the Republican frontrunner for Governor of Oklahoma – Charles McCall, who is currently the GOP Speaker of the Oklahoma House of Representatives – has decided that the biggest issue he’d like to address with voters is that “gender is god-given, and there’s only two of ‘em.” See below for his, truly, BANANAS, ad. You have to see it to believe it. = In addition to this horrifying ad, McCall’s campaign website brags about his record of passing the strongest anti-choice law in the nation, supporting legislation that attacks vaccines, holding an A rating from the NRA, banning sanctuary cities, erasing Critical Race Theory from schools, and much more. THE GOOD NEWS is that, if McCall wins the Republican primary, he will have a formidable and qualified Democratic WOMAN as his opponent. Her name is Cyndi Munson, and she is running a strong, well-organized campaign to be the GOVERNOR of Oklahoma. Her Bold Move is honored to support her. Unsurprisingly, Oklahoma is among the states with the lowest women’s representation in its state government – less than 20%. As outlined above, this underrepresentation is reflected in the state’s dangerous and draconian policies for women: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and automatically split between Her Bold Move and Cyndi Munson: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = As Governor, Cyndi will repeal Oklahoma’s abortion ban. As she’s been meeting with thousands of voters across her state, she’s found that voters on both sides of the aisle feel that the current anti-abortion laws do not meet their values and instead prevent women from getting the care they need. Additionally, according to the 2024 March of Dimes report, 51.9% of Oklahomans do not have access to maternity healthcare, and an additional 18.2% have low/moderate access to healthcare. As Governor, Cyndi wants to increase access to maternity healthcare for women across the state and fully eliminate these healthcare deserts. Her plan is to introduce legislation that would increase funding for hospitals and assist in the recruitment of doctors who specialize in women’s healthcare. Here’s the thing: Cyndi flipped a majority Republican district and has kept it for the last 10 years – she’s actually increased her win margins election after election. She accomplished this by knocking on doors, having honest conversations, and staying true to her values. Now, she needs our help to keep up that momentum. We’ve seen Democratic Governors win in “red” states – despite having Republican supermajorities in their State Houses and Senate chambers. Kentucky and Kansas, for example, have both elected popular Democratic Governors. If anyone can do it, it’s Cyndi Munson. Thank you, Colleen Davis Endorsements Manager Her Bold Move | | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for political office in America. | [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no-kings-protest/?source=VPP_20251111_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=21799%2E878179%2Efo1ipg) **MILLIONS of people stood up to say “NO KINGS” belong in America.**

**We’re THRILLED — and Trump is still _FURIOUS._ He’s lashing out at Democrats, attacking politicians, and throwing temper tantrums!**

But Friend, our main objective at the Voter Protection Project is to protect voting — _and voters._

That’s why we _need to know_ if _YOU_ were among the millions of brave Democrats who showed up in protest, Friend. Weeks later, we still don't have a full count!

[**Did you attend a “No Kings” protest on October 18?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no-kings-protest?source=VPP_20251111_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=21799%2E878179%2Efo1ipg) | [YES, I DID »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no-kings-protest?source=VPP_20251111_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=21799%2E878179%2Efo1ipg)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: Today, we honor the veterans who put everything on the line to serve this country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1267%2E251025%2EjnIk10 ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1267%2E251025%2EjnIk10 ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

Today, we honor the veterans who put everything on the line to serve this
country.

Their courage and sacrifice deserve more than our gratitude. They deserve
a government that has their back as they navigate life after serving.

I say that because far too often, MAGA politicians wrap themselves in the
flag and call themselves “true patriots.” But then, they turn around and
gut the very programs that help veterans get the care and stability they
deserve.

That’s not patriotism. That’s hypocrisy.

Honoring our veterans means using our collective power to support them by
guaranteeing healthcare, affordable housing, and opportunity.

When I led Wayne County’s Department of Health, Human & Veterans Services,
I saw firsthand how broken the system could be, and how much good
government can do when it’s run by people who care.

We restructured the agency from the ground up to better serve the 1.8
million Michiganders who relied on it.

We cut through red tape, expanded access to care, and worked every day to
bring dignity and compassion back to public service.

I’m proud of what we accomplished, but I know there’s still more work
ahead.

That’s why I’m running for Senate — to build a government that serves the
people, not corporations, and one that honors the courage of our veterans
with action, not empty words.

In solidarity,

Abdul

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251111-1-ak.aZfpfe&amount=10&refcode=em20251111-1262&t=1004&akid=1267%2E251025%2EjnIk10 ]Donate

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1005&akid=1267%2E251025%2EjnIk10

Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1006&akid=1267%2E251025%2EjnIk10

name: Jose Javier Rodriguez
subject: Standing with Florida's veterans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL
body:
I am grateful. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119074089/581846748/1546157161?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODdkYTQxMDAtMGRiZi1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MxzPE8nNUVXKJcSnfuSKb3ajjJajoW0SBnjAa2ZO_AA=&emci=866cb40f-83be-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=87da4100-0dbf-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=32374386)
---
I want to take this moment to honor and thank all those who have served our country. Florida is home to _over 1.3 million veterans._ **My own father was one of them — he served our country in the U.S. Army. His dedication to this nation shaped who I am and drives my commitment to serving others.** These men and women make our American way of life possible. They answered the call to serve, and they embody our most cherished values: duty, sacrifice, and service before self. Our service members deserve our recognition — not just today, but every day. It's our responsibility to always have their backs. That means holding our government accountable when veterans don't get the care and benefits they've earned. As your next Attorney General, I'll fight for veterans and their families and ensure they're treated with the dignity and respect they deserve. In solidarity, Jose Javier Rodriguez

name: Chris Pappas
subject: Keeping our promise to those who wore the uniform
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
#
This Veterans Day we pause to honor the brave individuals who served our country. It's a time to renew our commitment to our veterans, who deserve not just our gratitude but also our active support.
I grew up with the stories of service passed down from my grandparents, three of whom served in World War II. Both my grandfathers were pilots, and my grandmother proudly served in the Coast Guard. Their courage and dedication shaped my understanding of patriotism and continue to inspire me every single day.
Today far too many of our veterans face serious challenges when it comes to basic needs like housing, health care, employment, and food security. As a nation we owe them more than our remembrance — we owe them meaningful action that reflects the depth of their service.
This summer I introduced legislation to require the VA to operate a full-service Veterans Health Administration hospital in New Hampshire — the only state in the contiguous United States that doesn’t have one. Our veterans have put their lives on the line to protect our freedoms, and they ought to receive the care and benefits they have earned after their service.
I hope you’ll join me in honoring those who served by doing right by them. That’s how we live up to the promise we’ve made to every American who wears the uniform.
Wishing you and your family a safe and meaningful Veterans Day.
With appreciation,
Chris
**[Donate »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251111_1_veteransday.MUDTNE&refcode=em20251111-1&t=1&akid=3411%2E582294%2EGikftK)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=3411%2E582294%2EGikftK)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=3&akid=3411%2E582294%2EGikftK)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=3411%2E582294%2EGikftK)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

name: Team Chrissy
subject: As a third generation veteran
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
This Veterans Day, support our veterans and military
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119076674/581855380/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTUwN2YxNy0wZmJmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ShGSLJ-4ACViIsDL_Zbd0X5GGXHczHIEeKYco4kue0o=&emci=45295835-78be-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=d9507f17-0fbf-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=21278485)
---
Derek,
Today is Veterans Day – a day we honor the men and women who have served this country as members of the United States Armed Forces. November also marks Military Family Appreciation Month, when we share the stories and sacrifices of military families stationed all across the world.
It takes extraordinary people to place their country's needs above their own. That’s why today and every day, we’re thankful to the people – and their families – who dedicate their lives to protecting ours.

**As a third-generation veteran and former military kid, Chrissy knows how important it is to care for those who choose to serve our country.** And now as the top Democrat on the House Armed Services Committee Military Personnel Subcommittee, she is fighting to make sure we honor our promises to service members and their families.**She’s also leading the charge to remove Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth from his post because he’s simply not qualified to lead. **
Will you join the fight? This Veterans Day, will you be one of the 100 people we need to sign our petition standing with our military? [**Please, add your name to show your support for our military and veterans before midnight tonight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119076676/581855383/1123217874?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1185-su-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTUwN2YxNy0wZmJmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ShGSLJ-4ACViIsDL_Zbd0X5GGXHczHIEeKYco4kue0o=&emci=45295835-78be-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=d9507f17-0fbf-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=21278485)
| | [Show your support for our military and veterans!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119076677/581855384/1123217874?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1185-su-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTUwN2YxNy0wZmJmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ShGSLJ-4ACViIsDL_Zbd0X5GGXHczHIEeKYco4kue0o=&emci=45295835-78be-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=d9507f17-0fbf-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=21278485)

Team Chrissy

name: Andy Kim
subject: Here’s why I voted NO
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
There is no excuse for this. It’s a huge setback.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119076806/581855792/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGM4NzcxZC0wZmJmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KC5k0juLh8YjQmwth2MvG_IiOv_TVDj6Hb9wLInxUBw=&emci=d7783979-09bf-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=e4c8771d-0fbf-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=26261389)
---

| | What happened on the Senate floor last night was a disgrace, and I want to tell you why I voted NO on it. In the same chamber where the nation watched Senator McCain show courage in saving the ACA, we now saw a vote that will lead to millions losing healthcare. There is no excuse for this. It's a huge setback. Trump and Republican leaders created this crisis, and they've only used it to make things worse for working families by withholding food assistance for millions for their own political gain. Republicans have also been known to break promises, and we're already seeing Speaker Johnson refuse to make any commitment to a vote extending the Affordable Care Act subsidies. That's why we need to hold Speaker Johnson accountable. Families can't afford more delays, more broken promises, or more political games. Congress must act — not with half-measures or partisan posturing — but with a real vote to lower healthcare costs and protect access for millions of Americans. Now, we must regroup, continue to expose the cruelty of Trump's actions, and never stop fighting for the right to healthcare for every American. I'm going to continue to stand with so many who are being hurt. More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly:

clean_body: There is no excuse for this. It’s a huge setback. | | | | What happened on the Senate floor last night was a disgrace, and I want to tell you why I voted NO on it. In the same chamber where the nation watched Senator McCain show courage in saving the ACA, we now saw a vote that will lead to millions losing healthcare. There is no excuse for this. It's a huge setback. Trump and Republican leaders created this crisis, and they've only used it to make things worse for working families by withholding food assistance for millions for their own political gain. Republicans have also been known to break promises, and we're already seeing Speaker Johnson refuse to make any commitment to a vote extending the Affordable Care Act subsidies. That's why we need to hold Speaker Johnson accountable. Families can't afford more delays, more broken promises, or more political games. Congress must act — not with half-measures or partisan posturing — but with a real vote to lower healthcare costs and protect access for millions of Americans. Now, we must regroup, continue to expose the cruelty of Trump's actions, and never stop fighting for the right to healthcare for every American. I'm going to continue to stand with so many who are being hurt. More soon, Andy | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by . name: Team Green
subject: My promise to the 18th Congressional District
body:
We need government of the people, by the people, for the people.| | |
---
| | Friend, The 18th District has a powerful, historic legacy—the legacy of Barbara Jordan, Mickey Leland, Sheila Jackson Lee, and Sylvester Turner. For over 20 years, I have been honored to work alongside these giants, fighting for the adjacent 9th District. Now, as a result of a corrupt gerrymander, our communities have been merged. **In their absence, I am prepared to carry on the fight for _both_ the historic 9th and the historic 18th. I will be a voice for all of us.** My colleagues in Washington, _like Representatives Maxine Waters and Bennie Thompson, have made it clear: in a time of crisis,_ **"Seniority Matters."** As we continue to face a government shutdown and continued attacks on our democracy, this district deserves a proven fighter who has the seniority and the courage to lead. _**My record is clear. I have stood up to Donald Trump, and I promise you, I will continue to do so.**_ Your support today proves that the people of the 18th District are ready to send an experienced fighter back to Washington. **Please, join the fight. Chip in $50, $100, or whatever you can to our Day 1 Fund.** name: Pat Harrigan
subject: I’m not the kind of guy who asks for help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
But your response to this message will decide everything.
I'm ready to get to work with President Trump on the America-First agenda!

| [](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=e63a3aa81d0947f78c285d1dd1ac4237&_e=zdZxxHbJR4PIaAIcI8RUUeRnZHRdRL7U4AQMDJpQRwlnWWLDZeVS1Z6RThJ5TGGe-iioFRr--Qd2HEFF6zuiv_4JueXpT0SC2DmpfGrYIuWwy5-Ac8xqw5fh9FrWI52rFfDx-RkJgGoDNybUBxmSgAFTLLYB7DmOEwirjZurLHAopOpjfuTtvly-VWllFYPZrAK49T_vpmkUCyhqbzZHHNjAn2XBoQ7JL3Bi9GhDVPZUkJ-L0ec1xkdRVicV4FXxj3SL5O44kMwAAaqt3NEu1Dz7m7fsrrMjsb6Id-rtEFi6nNl8jBlbr7bhXRK1wflXtBhFle55AeyREJe1nBWlBnkvozd7h2HF6U10Q8WdOzbZ38oR4dQysLzYxSIQv7thGOWgVGN8HMKA20Qt7phe3Il1eBGwInOtG3XVxDCMv3ncRi2K5AbjNwJGWU44kqYLS-Gyfspm9RAQgQ91p8I5ACAlEVlPWkQinm0vf6KuIoO5AdAw4m1XQjQ9PyUGiQFQ8SA0__fjdhpfuc-URZ4_ie0G_wYrCGqEaD0z0bEe0ApmMLoBH94ROwDgGPmyd_aIdWlGaMGfDjBiqF0VUEuG6A%3D%3D)
---

Patriot,

I'm a little unsure about opening up to you this way.

**But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything.**

My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat.

[](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=e63a3aa81d0947f78c285d1dd1ac4237&_e=zdZxxHbJR4PIaAIcI8RUUeRnZHRdRL7U4AQMDJpQRwlnWWLDZeVS1Z6RThJ5TGGe-iioFRr--Qd2HEFF6zuiv_4JueXpT0SC2DmpfGrYIuWwy5-Ac8xqw5fh9FrWI52rFfDx-RkJgGoDNybUBxmSgE87qwA92wmma_tDr7SkW0JZjkzp3zfJdtzMrj_MUDkt0wry4OZQhBAPGeunFaEqGfHD775L21pbSc5ZA3jJAaGbVJv9DsQEC2VQIM58KxNQo9pO7Z1BELknlqiKozjVDKho89Loa_LXVzy1toZIeV4O4R_uwshpJDRawr1vqx5B0o_Zk3DeSVAsfuEkgkw77yj95DdcJwhRqKzKL_KUY4sajF6YaPi4cG7TrxuRs1xqyDLEI6-u25Lj-R3u_Nzj5JIldw4hTMvlufmf7wYIx1H5_wRJCCowJqmeKRmfXHkQ4fdtsUOEQBd9bH4bW4digLV6XNsj8CVKUe_oRFzVP6U1V0C3MSDu1wsHyaov-9v2s2HwwzFO3I1HK07tIy-Gh-hAJsATe4UbulFRfLyLZGs%3D)
After that, my wife and I started a firearm parts company from our double-wide trailer - and grew it to become a successful, job-creating business.

**Here 's a picture of my wife and me at the new member orientation in Washington. **

[](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=e63a3aa81d0947f78c285d1dd1ac4237&_e=zdZxxHbJR4PIaAIcI8RUUeRnZHRdRL7U4AQMDJpQRwlnWWLDZeVS1Z6RThJ5TGGe-iioFRr--Qd2HEFF6zuiv_4JueXpT0SC2DmpfGrYIuWwy5-Ac8xqw5fh9FrWI52rFfDx-RkJgGoDNybUBxmSgE87qwA92wmma_tDr7SkW0JZjkzp3zfJdtzMrj_MUDktVqdMFq0xPyLz8SbxQ19siqO81gZGs_qvij4UgSJADvdKuGs3djxB-EhT4BUzoeQ7NNLnOWhJ4G-xCiEntjKwhaY36AErW_ATZI7FadhkpSuKnJH6PuB8ufPUkB_Wk7xaduFezHccTRVFNyC0a6G7o0a4oEPV_Ec7-G2awRdY-SPCnNKFhlpQea3wedTKLt8ABpfsF6kcueqKYyrlGcqnU3mP4nRyKv7xvjLM_CqEaqRaZnu3k1hJuk1IQl5TnDu_dYU2Vb7Mrpc8iI6YedchgQpqmnEQkT69V3CUbGJpMa2xEx3g7R8BAf1uUNNIChQ-gkxIGJMR_Gc3zSuGXgb4i1w3f70LZ93fcPtqe-bb-bM%3D)
Most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls. I'm honored to have won my race for North Carolina's 10th Congressional District, and I'm ready to work alongside President Trump to make our nation great again. **
**
With President Trump in the Oval Office and House and Senate Majorities in Congress, we 're more equipped than ever to get our country back on track. The only thing we're missing is the resources to keep going.

**[That’s why I’m humbly asking if you’ll chip in just a few bucks today.](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=e63a3aa81d0947f78c285d1dd1ac4237&_e=zdZxxHbJR4PIaAIcI8RUUeRnZHRdRL7U4AQMDJpQRwlnWWLDZeVS1Z6RThJ5TGGe-iioFRr--Qd2HEFF6zuiv_4JueXpT0SC2DmpfGrYIuWwy5-Ac8xqw5fh9FrWI52rFfDx-RkJgGoDNybUBxmSgAFTLLYB7DmOEwirjZurLHAopOpjfuTtvly-VWllFYPZvMSYAPTYO06f1Pk36MiaDVf68oNcSHrPoOvKZwdRD9NTC_cRznUK0Dl2IClEVB_Aji3Yi07ORNXmUcEA_sceLjuIK45ELPlMwrhdv5RGNBgap8i8qzLKGICeEWel83rMf5GYvk8RuXMG7BzDrdEqk_hudjKMrSyXMf8bjMVSnQ1SMgX-jwOzZb5TIGAKX4sl1tsgFL3Y0x4HjmRlxBAHCiGfKpbm0tKMIkx-iJdqv37Pv3m3kO3_NAjdxZLWoAzFhRVgcbQmYIo0y2yH7ZfGqG9OQyL0UFr4Erts34eakD3Pscgx95g203bTVTel0KAPRy5Q5efMvSwTQkNSyP7KRKO-plo7GImmr92R3naYk7qsL4MiQSTOps2j0hy-lWwE9I8EFjt9gRpNi72p1AKNfg%3D%3D)**

I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but making real changes to help hardworking Americans can be tough - **really, really tough.**

The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to success we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts.

clean_body: But your response to this message will decide everything. I'm ready to get to work with President Trump on the America-First agenda! | Patriot, I'm a little unsure about opening up to you this way. But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything. My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat. After that, my wife and I started a firearm parts company from our double-wide trailer - and grew it to become a successful, job-creating business. Here 's a picture of my wife and me at the new member orientation in Washington. Most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls. I'm honored to have won my race for North Carolina's 10th Congressional District, and I'm ready to work alongside President Trump to make our nation great again. With President Trump in the Oval Office and House and Senate Majorities in Congress, we 're more equipped than ever to get our country back on track. The only thing we're missing is the resources to keep going. I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but making real changes to help hardworking Americans can be tough - really, really tough. The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to success we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts. Please have my back on this one: | Look, I'm not a politician. I'm nothing flashy or special, just a regular guy who loves this country more than anything. I won't give you empty promises & fancy slogans. That's not me. But I'll give you my word as a veteran that I'll fight with all I have to do what's right and make you proud. | Friend,

**_Democrats TROUNCED us in voter turnout and enthusiasm! The Left showed up to the polls in _DROVES_ while our often-reliable Republican voters simply stayed home._**

subject: Today we honor those who answered the call to defend our nation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
They made sacrifices so we can live in a country that stands for democracy. Your vote is critical to keeping our democracy alive. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119077443/581857900/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20251111_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDYwYTBjYi0wZmJmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=60t-MlWZlEPxEo4aPlRQif-0lVMVFlI4aH26qsY0Czs=&emci=e5a35f4c-7fbe-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=8460a0cb-0fbf-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=252045)
---
Today is Veterans Day, **a day when we honor those who answered the call to defend our nation.** I’m reflecting on the sacrifices of all of our veterans — including the Navajo code talkers and Bataan Death March survivors who sacrificed so much for New Mexico and our country in World War II. And I’m thinking of my father, a veteran and a lineman. **But we owe so much more than words of gratitude. Our veterans and their families are owed action.** Throughout my time in the Senate, I have fought hard to make sure we keep our promises to our veterans. I secured funds to support the success and growth of veteran-owned businesses in New Mexico. And I co-led passage of the _PACT Act_ to provide more care and benefits to those exposed to toxins during their time in the military. Donald Trump doesn’t respect our service members and veterans. He called Marines “suckers.” He has fought tooth and nail to NOT fund SNAP benefits, which over a million veterans depend on. He laid off thousands from the Department of Veterans Affairs, and left millions more veterans in limbo amid a month-long government shutdown his party created. _I can tell you we will never be able to do right by these patriotic Americans as long as we have a commander in chief who is clearly not up to the task._ Today and every day, we must remember the sacrifices that brave Americans have made and continue to make today so we can live in a country that stands for democracy. To all veterans, their families, and active service members defending our freedoms, thank you for your courage and selflessness. Sincerely, Martin Heinrich
---
| Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
---
Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. name: Glenn Grothman
subject: Happy Veterans Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Glenn Grothman for Congress
body:
| | | Make sure you thank a veteran today, my friend. I am honored to be a voice for those who served our nation in the Armed Services.
During the government shutdown, I have continued to fight to ensure our veterans have access to the care and benefits they deserve. While in Congress, I have had the great privilege of meeting many of our nation’s bravest, who sacrificed comfort, time with their families, and even their lives to protect us all. I am moved beyond words by their service. To all of you who have served our country, _**thank you****!**_ Your service to our country is an inspiration to us all. Sincerely, **Glenn Grothman**

name: Dr. Mary L. Trump
subject: Our democracy won’t be auctioned off to the highest bidder
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
That’s why we’re electing + protecting Democrats
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4ca5c09c-6af7-4003-a897-8a6b6fea0654/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, Right now, everything we believe in is on the line: the future of our climate, any shred of reproductive rights women have left, dignity for immigrants, economic fairness for working families, and so much more. While billionaires pour millions into extremist Republican campaigns, we’re building a people-powered movement to elect Democrats who will protect our rights and stand up for justice — not sell out our democracy to the highest bidder. That’s why we work directly with champions like Blue Amp Action, helping fund essential campaign efforts like voter outreach, advertising, and organizing so they can compete and win. [With the midterms fast approaching, we’re uniting to build unstoppable momentum. If you’re ready to help stop Trump’s dangerous agenda and elect leaders who will move this country forward, will you split a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Blue Amp Action today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfd2bd576-440e-4e12-b00e-db1c17fab343/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | [DONATE $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/T709feeb0-e0d6-477f-a795-5eb089350319/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $25](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5ad0d8e8-cdec-4083-a754-7fcfbfa1049c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE MORE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2220e474-61a4-489f-a957-940320c30023/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| We’re not just fighting against something — we’re fighting for something: ✅ A healthy, livable planet ✅ The right to make our own health decisions ✅ Compassion, fairness, and a real path to citizenship for immigrants ✅ An economy that works for everyone, not just the wealthy ✅ A democracy that belongs to us all Peter, while Blue Amp Action is fighting these battles on the frontlines, the Democracy Defense Fund is building a war chest to help elect and protect Democrats across the country ahead of the 2026 midterms. [By making a donation, you’re supporting both our ongoing work to defend democracy and Blue Amp Action who’s fighting on the front lines of these battles. Multiply your impact and split a contribution between our campaigns today so we can block Donald’s agenda and make life better for working families across the country.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T34246818-80be-4aca-85b5-a55aae0182b1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [SPLIT A DONATION »](https://default.salsalabs.org/T80b7ac45-842c-433d-83f3-22c7975f32cb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | Let's show the world that when Democrats unite behind our values, we win. Thanks for joining the fight, [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdcc20228-91a6-4e33-b14a-b646287e9a65/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Dr. Mary L. Trump Founder, Democracy Defense Fund
---

---|---
| | |
---
| |
| **Blue Amp Action**
PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampaction.salsalabs.org/loc_em_fr_20251111_mt-democracy_b1_f1_s1_c1_warmup_n-t0?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td7814ce7-ab0d-4f03-8f3b-5061ee4dfe0c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Paid for by Blue Amp Action

---

body:

Friend,
---
I’m officially running to be the next Governor of New York to FIRE Kathy Hochul, serve as the FINAL FIREWALL against Zohran Mamdani, and SAVE the Empire State from a full-blown communist takeover.
---
With so much at stake, I didn’t waste even a minute producing our very first ad of the campaign.
---
_But with polls already showing us** _LEADING Hochul by 1 POINT_** , she and Mamdani haven’t wasted any time either... _
---
Within just _seconds_ of announcing my campaign, they already began blasting out a lying attack ad to smear me!
---
**This election will come down to a simple calculus, Friend:_every minute our own ad isn’t up and running is another minute Hochul and Mamdani are directly attacking us._**
---
But that's where my top supporters like _YOU_ come in.
---

name: Reid Rasner, CEO
subject: What retirees fear most (it's not what you think)
body:
| Hi Peter, What's your biggest fear about retirement? Most people answer this question the same. They're afraid of running out of money. And for most people, the idea of outliving their savings is even more frightening than the idea of dying.1 Now, guess how many people have a plan for not running out of money? It's far fewer than you'd expect.1 To make matters more challenging, many retirement plans fall short of factoring in the less obvious, but very real, costs that can add up over time.
---
|
---
[**Click here to see it!**](https://financeinsights.net/mM6mhErdJur43nzuPa4x1CpdeGA?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) For many, running out of money in retirement doesn't happen overnight. It's often the result of small miscalculations, unexpected detours, or plans that never flexed with time. That's not inevitable, though. The better you understand retirement spending and how long your money has to stretch, the better prepared you'll be for whatever comes next. [Discover the hidden costs that catch many retirees off guard, and how you can stay a step ahead. Click here.](https://financeinsights.net/mM6mhErdJur43nzuPa4x1CpdeGA?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) Warmly,
---
**Reid Rasner - CEO**
Omnivest Financial
(307) 337-1223
[https://www.omnivestfinancial.com](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cub21uaXZlc3RmaW5hbmNpYWwuY29tIiwiaGFzaCI6ImxxNldpYnFkN2lKME9OYSIsImNvbnRhY3RfZW1haWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9)
* * *
---
P.S. What fun plans do you have for retirement? Hit "reply" and share your answers. I'd love to hear what you're looking forward to the most and what's on your retirement bucket list. Sources 1 – Allianz, 2025 [URL: [https://www.allianzlife.com/about/newsroom/2025-Press-Releases/Americans-Are-More-Worried-About-Running-Out-of-Money-Than-Death](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cuYWxsaWFuemxpZmUuY29tXC9hYm91dFwvbmV3c3Jvb21cLzIwMjUtUHJlc3MtUmVsZWFzZXNcL0FtZXJpY2Fucy1BcmUtTW9yZS1Xb3JyaWVkLUFib3V0LVJ1bm5pbmctT3V0LW9mLU1vbmV5LVRoYW4tRGVhdGgiLCJoYXNoIjoibHE2V2licWQ3aUowT05hIiwiY29udGFjdF9lbWFpbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0)]

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---
Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Help unseat the Andrew Cuomo's of Congress →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Last week, New Yorkers changed New York to build the city they deserve by
electing Zohran Mamdani to be their next mayor.

Now, they can change Washington to build the Congress they deserve by
unseating the Andrew Cuomo’s of Congress.

It’s no secret that New York City is overrun with corporate Democrats in
the U.S. House who opposed Zohran and even endorsed Cuomo — an entitled
member of a political family dynasty accused of sexual misconduct and
covering up COVID nursing home deaths, who was endorsed by Donald Trump —
over Zohran. They take millions from corporate Super PACs and AIPAC, and
have even voted in support of Trump’s corrupt, authoritarian agenda.

So today, Justice Democrats is officially launching our “Primary NYC’s
Corporate Democrats Fund” to fuel Democratic primary challenges against
billionaires’ favorite members of Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251111.2EgO7p&refcode=em20251111-37185&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=37185%2E1203867%2EW-cFXE ]Will you rush $5 right now to directly support the Fund?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251111.2EgO7p&refcode=em20251111-37185&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1021&akid=37185%2E1203867%2EW-cFXE ]Contribute $5

Every member of Congress in NYC who is bankrolled by corporate PACs is a
possible target. But their corporate war chests mean we need to build as
many resources as possible if we’re going to have a shot at unseating them
in 2026 and beyond.

There are plenty of progressive, working-class champions out there
stepping up to run for Congress to give their communities the
representation they deserve.

In order for them to win, they need everyday people across the country to
believe in them and show their support — even when it doesn’t feel
possible.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251111.2EgO7p&refcode=em20251111-37185&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=37185%2E1203867%2EW-cFXE ]Let’s build on Zohran’s victory in New York by sending all of Cuomo’s
friends in Washington to early retirement, too. Pitch in whatever you can
afford: every dollar goes to defeating a corporate stooge in Congress.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20251111-37185-footer&t=1023&refcode2=37185_1203867_W-cFXE&akid=37185%2E1203867%2EW-cFXE

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. name: Royce White
subject: We’re as dumb as a box of rocks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
Will you spare two minutes to let me explain? | [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=3acae8bc0d404295a093a295913a4c2d&_e=VNsC1RoDZrpZbHHvAsHIoVA4XUAPOu9Ub9O4XIxwrO_O9XS7nz19w6nywXIQwghaAxX1yOfMvLDrum675Ej-44HFNzAWGGQdqkw423mJuYsWUlY6Jv4wLxPbkSzLDg-Itk69oiZpof_jX-RQcn--CS0p-UGstt7fVfEq3RzpsLFrD-UD5VTHTdms6oBYsn-zCu4mKs9ZmLHoHP9OoYgnTfLoilRrkph5C3UuH7BzPutqimqDV2gl1iDxbDz1k6LnhicboeCdvxdo9Y4R8M_vxa85hMXIbdBzaQCcyPORk6_k1t27xfHAWEWIuko0HnGYFC8OHXbOXCyVkTGbCeN-HBxWx02_5S0joMrxJULUq7DMrRadaxWdXBNJaWIBhBnMiB_2P2kFzBE_YPYEP2kf9sjYposJbrT8N-vbzWwklbodVmSe9eoxxjWjwLsd1__Nq3comnSW1uJfhCAR6M2kRjx3CpZME7MtegKurAn0z1ibfqZ4QzjA_MTHNXJBwXY4XWp-gyS4C42c1hM6RlccpkhQ1Kq_abmx216nBYFwnsA5udS4gX7dF3qTVTH4sRLo)
---

Peter,

We're so pseudo-intellectual these days. It's like a fad to pretend to be "woke" or "educated", when in reality there's way more “following what I was told or casually picked up.” There's more intentional intellectual dishonesty.

I spoke my piece, so nobody can say I don't try. By the way, there is no "team" of people putting together statements for me; I write all my own content. You can check my Substack to confirm.

_**I get it, though. I see what's wrong. We're dumb as a box of rocks.**_

And I don't say that to be rude or disrespectful, as strange as that may sound. I really mean by scientific and statistical measurement, we are dumb. Yet we are so insistent that our opinion is the absolute truth.

We can never allow the development of our children's intellect to be bastardized and weaponized this way. The development of the intellect is the essential building block of a healthy society. We are dumb... not everyone, but enough. I know that's not a nice thing to say, but holy smokes. And I'll use this example below because I believe in dealing with my own people 1st. But make no mistake about it, I see the lack of authenticity and novel thought across the spectrum of race, sex (2 sexes only), and most importantly, political party.

**You get the government you deserve, and by God, we all will.** I'm just here to tell the truth and educate. I think we're too interested in gossip. I think we're too invested in sports. I think we're overleveraged in the political "dispute" versus the actual problems. But hey, continue on.

I'll say this to end, communism is a threat to national security. Somebody needs to have the backbone to treat it that way.

subject: The shutdown may be over…
body:
But the damage is real.

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3779bd19525b/tockcw1cwy-169?e=81ab29c4d2)
---
[|
---](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=5c7ad5bdb3&e=81ab29c4d2)
| | | | | | Peter,
---
| | For seven weeks Americans were pawns in political Hunger Games. The government shutdown may be heading toward a resolution — but the message from Republicans couldn’t be clearer.
**Trump and his extremist followers in Washington turned** _**food**_**into a weapon.** They used SNAP benefits as leverage, holding millions of families hostage just to force through their cruel, anti-working class budget.
And when it mattered most, eight Democratic Senators caved to Republican pressure, essentially gutting affordable healthcare and stifling the momentum building from last week’s major election wins.
---
[|
---](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=a45f0d4bd6&e=81ab29c4d2)
| | This is the same playbook we’re seeing across the globe — like in Gaza, where food and aid were withheld to break the will of the people. **The weaponization of hunger is a tool of control.** It’s not policy — it’s cruelty.
We can’t let this stand.
Food is a right, not a bargaining chip. **Democracy means dignity** , and no one should go hungry while politicians posture.
---
| [JOIN THE MOVEMENT](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=7fb78f4263&e=81ab29c4d2)
---
| | The Movement for Freedom fights back — organizing communities, training new leaders, and demanding a government that serves people, not power. [Stand with us and help build a democracy that can’t be bought, bullied, or starved.](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=fb992bd67a&e=81ab29c4d2)
Because when they use hunger as a weapon, we all need to support real movement leaders who push back.
---
| |
_**The Movement for Freedom Team**_
---
| | | | | | | [|
---](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=8bfa65205d&e=81ab29c4d2)

name: Nancy Northup
subject: Honor their service. Protect their rights.
body:
Our veterans deserve better | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/119080218/581866538/2141984067?sourceid=1150967&utm_campaign=26emkge-1105aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=veteransday&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWI1NmRhZi0xNGJmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y3PlL0_sU-RB62uIUZPp4ittQMm-ZRQwii3ahPNjFHs=&emci=0a47c8a7-7dbe-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=95b56daf-14bf-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=954237) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/119080219/581866539/2141984067?sourceid=1150967&utm_campaign=26emkge-1105aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=veteransday&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWI1NmRhZi0xNGJmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y3PlL0_sU-RB62uIUZPp4ittQMm-ZRQwii3ahPNjFHs=&emci=0a47c8a7-7dbe-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=95b56daf-14bf-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=954237)
---|---
Dear Peter,

[**On Veterans Day, we don't just honor the service and sacrifice of those who have served—we fight to protect their rights.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/119080220/581866540/2141984067?sourceid=1150967&utm_campaign=26emkge-1105aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=veteransday&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWI1NmRhZi0xNGJmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y3PlL0_sU-RB62uIUZPp4ittQMm-ZRQwii3ahPNjFHs=&emci=0a47c8a7-7dbe-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=95b56daf-14bf-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=954237)

A newly proposed Trump administration rule would prohibit veterans from accessing abortion care through the Department of Veterans Affairs health system—even in cases of rape, incest, and to preserve the health of the veteran. It's a cruel, unconscionable attempt to deny veterans the very freedoms and rights they fought to defend.

[**If you're angry, you're not alone—and the time to act is now.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/119080221/581866541/2141984067?sourceid=1150967&utm_campaign=26emkge-1105aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=veteransday&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWI1NmRhZi0xNGJmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y3PlL0_sU-RB62uIUZPp4ittQMm-ZRQwii3ahPNjFHs=&emci=0a47c8a7-7dbe-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=95b56daf-14bf-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=954237) | [**PROTECT THEIR RIGHTS**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/119080222/581866542/2141984067?sourceid=1150967&utm_campaign=26emkge-1105aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=veteransday&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWI1NmRhZi0xNGJmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y3PlL0_sU-RB62uIUZPp4ittQMm-ZRQwii3ahPNjFHs=&emci=0a47c8a7-7dbe-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=95b56daf-14bf-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=954237 "PROTECT THEIR RIGHTS")
---
This administration's message is clear: it doesn't believe our veterans' rights and dignity are worth defending. This dangerous proposal devalues their service and puts their health at risk.

[**The Center is committed to fighting for our veterans, today and every day.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/119080223/581866543/2141984067?sourceid=1150967&utm_campaign=26emkge-1105aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=veteransday&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWI1NmRhZi0xNGJmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y3PlL0_sU-RB62uIUZPp4ittQMm-ZRQwii3ahPNjFHs=&emci=0a47c8a7-7dbe-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=95b56daf-14bf-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=954237) There is no better way to honor their service than to defend their freedom just as they've committed their lives to fighting for ours.

In solidarity,

Nancy Northup
President & CEO

P.S. [**We hope to see you tomorrow at our Town Hall!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/119080224/581866544/646894325?sourceid=1150967&utm_campaign=26emkge-1105aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=veteransday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWI1NmRhZi0xNGJmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y3PlL0_sU-RB62uIUZPp4ittQMm-ZRQwii3ahPNjFHs=&emci=0a47c8a7-7dbe-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=95b56daf-14bf-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=954237) Experts from our team will be answering your questions about the fight for reproductive rights. RSVP NOW!

name: Haley Stevens
subject: Thank you to all those who have served
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
a promise this Veterans Day

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1327%2E49239%2E4Gt50W)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8198?t=2&akid=1327%2E49239%2E4Gt50W)
---
null,

I’ve always believed public service is a sacred responsibility – and no one embodies that more than our veterans.
Today, on Veterans Day, I’m thinking of the hundreds of thousands of Michiganders who answered the call to serve – not for personal glory, but out of love of country and for each other.
In Congress, I’ve had the privilege of working alongside veterans to deliver results that honor that service. I’ve fought to expand job training for veterans transitioning to civilian life, secure critical funding for the VA, and ensure access to the health care – including mental health support – that every veteran deserves.
But right now, our country is failing too many of them.

Because of the ongoing government shutdown and chaos from Trump and his allies, VA staff are working without pay, critical benefits are delayed, and veterans are facing uncertainty they should never have to endure.
What’s worse: Trump’s budget cuts are threatening the very programs veterans rely on – from health care to housing to job assistance.

We owe our veterans so much more.
That’s part of why I’m running for the U.S. Senate: to fight for those who’ve served, to defend their benefits from political games, and to make sure this country always shows up for everyone who puts on the uniform.

But I can’t do it alone. We’ve got a lot of work to do – and I need your help to get there.
If you believe veterans deserve leaders who will fight for them – and never forget their sacrifices – **[will you chip in $5 to help me win this race and bring that fight to the U.S. Senate?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8181?t=3&akid=1327%2E49239%2E4Gt50W)**
| | [Donate](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8181?t=4&akid=1327%2E49239%2E4Gt50W)
---
With gratitude,

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8185?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=1327%2E49239%2E4Gt50W) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8198?t=6&akid=1327%2E49239%2E4Gt50W)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=7&akid=1327%2E49239%2E4Gt50W)

Birmingham, MI 48009

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: America will become unrecognizable unless we fight back.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yes on 50, The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
Wake up!

**America will become unrecognizable unless we fight back.**
Last night's Senate vote on the federal government shutdown should have been a time for strength. Instead, what we saw was a betrayal of working Americans.
Wake up.
I don't think it's an exaggeration to say there's a revolution going on in this country. It's no longer about co-equal branches of government. It's no longer about the rule of law. It's about the rule of Don.
And I hope it dawns on people that unless we hold the line against Donald Trump, America will become unrecognizable.
**[Please watch.](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/5322?t=1&akid=2786%2E4767699%2EgGWVqY)**
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/5322?t=2&akid=2786%2E4767699%2EgGWVqY)
I thought after last Tuesday's election we had woken up; that we had gotten the message from the American people that they want leaders who will fight back.
We've got a lot of work to do.
Gavin Newsom
* * *
i️ To my fellow Democrats — don't scroll past this. 🇺🇸
I have a book coming out in a few weeks. It's called "Young Man in a Hurry." It's a good book. Very personal. At the same time, we just spent a bunch of money on passing Prop 50, so now I need to refill that coffers at my Campaign for Democracy for the fights ahead
If you make a contribution of ANY AMOUNT, I'll send you a copy of my new book when it comes out. The average cost per book is $22.45 including shipping. If you can give that, great. If you can only give $5, great. If you want to cover the cost for a few folks who can only give a few bucks, great.
[**Make a contribution of ANY AMOUNT today and I will send you a copy of my new book, "Young Man in a Hurry." clean_body: Wake up! America will become unrecognizable unless we fight back. Last night's Senate vote on the federal government shutdown should have been a time for strength. Instead, what we saw was a betrayal of working Americans. Wake up. I don't think it's an exaggeration to say there's a revolution going on in this country. It's no longer about co-equal branches of government. It's no longer about the rule of law. It's about the rule of Don. And I hope it dawns on people that unless we hold the line against Donald Trump, America will become unrecognizable. I thought after last Tuesday's election we had woken up; that we had gotten the message from the American people that they want leaders who will fight back. We've got a lot of work to do. Gavin Newsom i️ To my fellow Democrats — don't scroll past this. 🇺🇸 I have a book coming out in a few weeks. It's called "Young Man in a Hurry." It's a good book. Very personal. At the same time, we just spent a bunch of money on passing Prop 50, so now I need to refill that coffers at my Campaign for Democracy for the fights ahead If you make a contribution of ANY AMOUNT, I'll send you a copy of my new book when it comes out. The average cost per book is $22.45 including shipping. If you can give that, great. If you can only give $5, great. Patriot, Uncle Sam owes me a Christmas. As a young Special Forces Recon Marine back in 1990, my unit got the call: _**pack your gear, you’re headed out.**_ Christmas Eve at 11 PM, we boarded a Pan Am 747 bound for Saudi Arabia, where we landed on December 26th.**** __**No Christmas tree. No family dinner. Just a plane full of Marines heading into Operation Desert Shield.**__ Out in the desert, we lived in the dirt, called in airstrikes, and slipped across borders to gather intel. General Schwarzkopf told us, _“Make as much noise as you can.”_ Task Force Ripper did exactly that. I came home with a Combat Action Ribbon, a Meritorious Mast, and a few scars that don’t show on the outside. But most of all, I came home with a lifelong love for this country and a promise to keep serving it. **[That’s why I’m stepping forward again, to serve New Mexico and America in Congress.](http://links.gopwins.info/u/click?_t=98057da4e99f4c609080f212fe1184e1&_m=ad09f409c6024e588a27fa4a51dd1fd2&_e=iWsT4dLPMS0UJp_8AU820ws5GYnh1VIYMrmT--PTsZnIrzZQn1KVPxgSJE91THkciLQDP2z426pJw0BuPiQa9Ow0aO9eHC2ogARZtklZsvz7zOf4C3gox-Aq_avuXiwb7knHPIJ5cY8JZfuyiiX1GGVVAeKG2elFMG5YboU3b7bxAYTbnYdYAQhZD-AAUlgYAfNaBk_Ju9veIO61ZWNJY6qVWgEjA9ijWSrlk0eXHGSajMwuV0HIY-BEa3Fs5M6CffCzpXoi3KEOtqaENm9wjH2ZMCsMGtpH5ar9iCJh4hWgtObRzWZKyB309Y4R0A8qYrg2_2wE2F4AktESfKkWOXpyEC6fsAsi0A6ONuqgb9dIZBagLii9MBBm6n7oUBSSvX7jFUKlZLPlncKOoYzvWAM7XZIUwEVhsHwlfOhZBJTmheC9-majzzX7EYbT8_LrXIPFfK_8GbzNw91iFObA0rQFdSDvbjI1X55hllfEpoeSQLOw2IJuXkCoCVmJFW0xF6_Xb3OgiN8nAneB7zS5uPjy5oYuL022-ud73chz8Pd5-Q5BoAerEVi0AzwSwTKH4-k3GhDyDRmjN_34MePJ7qaoU56h_a6Zo3vRQoSAnmSiFkST04gekJwzP3mbOTPo_SgwZvWF9LF-pH2DwL83pW0FaPbKlLdsfOAwwnRiEGRlLZeLK6UnLaFkIAFZJik45rmLig2T6IB-KcGg8UUh0rrX7TXiaP8dbILBLPuE5lgl-i0uQiGTFTTvocVDxQY-Ss3SZOKzO3GuwIUaS25NvjDP94ebGe3enVJvGHXFWzY%3D)**

| | If you’ve ever missed a holiday, a milestone, or a moment because duty called, you know what that kind of service feels like. This Veterans Day, I’m asking you to stand with me. Let’s honor everyone who’s answered that call, and fight for the country we love. clean_body: Uncle Sam owes me a Christmas | | | Patriot, Uncle Sam owes me a Christmas. As a young Special Forces Recon Marine back in 1990, my unit got the call: pack your gear, you’re headed out. Christmas Eve at 11 PM, we boarded a Pan Am 747 bound for Saudi Arabia, where we landed on December 26th.** No Christmas tree. No family dinner. Just a plane full of Marines heading into Operation Desert Shield. Out in the desert, we lived in the dirt, called in airstrikes, and slipped across borders to gather intel. General Schwarzkopf told us, “Make as much noise as you can.” Task Force Ripper did exactly that. I came home with a Combat Action Ribbon, a Meritorious Mast, and a few scars that don’t show on the outside. But most of all, I came home with a lifelong love for this country and a promise to keep serving it. ** | | If you’ve ever missed a holiday, a milestone, or a moment because duty called, you know what that kind of service feels like. This Veterans Day, I’m asking you to stand with me. Let’s honor everyone who’s answered that call, and fight for the country we love. Thank you for your generosity, Greg Cunningham | | Paid for by Cunningham for NM, P.O. Box 1197, Las Cruces, NM 88004. | | Use of Greg Cunningham's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. Well the shutdown is substantially over as 8 Democratic Senators voted to reopen the government on Sunday. They were promised a vote on Obamacare subsidies and that all fired federal workers would be rehired with back pay.
Just about every Democrat has blasted this resolution as caving to Republicans. Ro Khanna called for Chuck Schumer's ouster saying, "Senator Schumer is no longer effective and should be replaced. If you can't lead the fight to stop healthcare premiums from skyrocketing for Americans, what will you fight for?" Gavin Newsom said, "America deserves better . . . now is not the time to roll over." Even generally moderate voices like Chris Murphy said, "This CR is a major mistake . . . we were building momentum to help save our democracy." Calls to primary Schumer were everywhere online, with polling showing that AOC would beat him if she were to challenge him.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3f0301e8-1903-48bb-8a5f-9aabb9c7b6ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
So why give in? "I came to the conclusion that they were not going to cave on that red line [of healthcare subsidies]" said Tim Kaine, Senator of Virginia. Senator Shaheen of New Hampshire observed, "Waiting another week or another month wouldn't deliver a better outcome." Abigail Spanberger, who just became governor-elect of Virginia, called for the government to reopen. Not coincidentally, Virginia is home to 187,000+ federal employees who had been missing paychecks. Indeed, the federal employee union, which had initially backed the shutdown, called for Dems to reopen the government last week.
That's when I knew it was going to end; when your biggest allies who are getting impacted say, "Hey guys, enough is enough," you are going to pull the ripcord.
The real-world harms were rippling out from the shutdown. Millions were unsure of when their SNAP benefits were going to resume or how much they would get. Thousands of flights were getting canceled, and FAA retirements and dropouts from training were up. Hundreds of thousands of federal employees were going without paychecks and some were laid off. It was going from bad to worse day by day.
As you can tell, I think ending the shutdown was the right move if your goal is a functioning government and, say, reliable air travel or food stamps. The only reason you could argue that it was a mistake is if you knew that, in another 24 or 48 hours, Trump and the Republicans were going to capitulate on healthcare. Do you see that? The opposite was true, as Trump dug in over the weekend, suggesting a completely different pay-for measure.
Some people are arguing that Schumer made the decision to reopen the government, as all 8 Dem Senators who voted for the measure are not on the ballot next year. I'm sure that's right. Chuck looked up and said, "Okay, we're not going to get what we want. We'd better call this before people get irreversibly hurt." He gave the Dems a way out.
I find this to be a reasonable path to take. I was always dubious that the shutdown was going to meaningfully change the approach on healthcare - shutdowns don't accomplish their policy goal - but I was confident it would do real-world harm and reduce institutional integrity. The Democrats are, in theory, the party of good government. That includes funding the government and things like food stamps.
Unfortunately, the blowback that Schumer is getting, including being lambasted by dozens of Dems whom I ordinarily regard as pretty reasonable, shows that the Democratic base has more of a thirst for combat and victory than they do sizing up a tough situation, looking out for the people being hurt and making difficult choices. It's easy to shit talk and say, "We need fighters!" It's harder to, say, hold a primary for your 81-year-old incumbent when the insiders are quashing dissent or accept that you didn't have a winning hand in a confrontation. There's groupthink and then there's leadership. We need the latter, but the former is getting louder and louder.
[Offline](https://substack.com/redirect/24078bad-e94d-4867-aeac-be6f4c7d5f61?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) no-phones party is on the way to Chicago, SF and LA this week in connection with the Scott Galloway podcast tour - see you there! Email [matt@noblemobile.com](https://substack.com/redirect/c3173688-572f-4fc8-9355-60efcb8beb12?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) if you want a few months off from your wireless bill and want to be rewarded with [Noble Mobile](https://substack.com/redirect/8660c212-983e-4a3c-8bf0-391733770c78?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Look up.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/aad2e532-a760-4e1d-8e05-07b7eb507e6e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

name: Greg Landsman
subject: Honoring those who served
body:
| | |
---
| | , This Tuesday, November 11th, marks Veterans Day, a day to honor every American who has served in our armed forces.As someone who represents Southwest Ohio, I think about the thousands of veterans in our community who answered the call to serve. They come from every neighborhood in Cincinnati, from Price Hill to Hyde Park, from Westwood to Mount Adams. They've served in every branch, in war and conflict, and they deserve our deepest gratitude.Veterans Day isn't just about saying thank you. It's about making sure we live up to our promises. That means quality healthcare at the VA. That means good jobs when they come home. That means support for families who've sacrificed alongside them.I'm fighting in Congress to make sure our veterans get the full benefits they've earned and deserve - not cuts, not delays, just what they were promised.If you're a veteran struggling to access your benefits, my office can help. Call us at (513) 810-7988.To every veteran reading this: thank you for your service to our country.Appreciate you,_Greg_ 💙🙏
---
| | Landsman for Congress
PO Box 413
Cincinnati, OH 45201
United States
---

clean_body: | | | | | , This Tuesday, November 11th, marks Veterans Day, a day to honor every American who has served in our armed forces.As someone who represents Southwest Ohio, I think about the thousands of veterans in our community who answered the call to serve. They come from every neighborhood in Cincinnati, from Price Hill to Hyde Park, from Westwood to Mount Adams. They've served in every branch, in war and conflict, and they deserve our deepest gratitude.Veterans Day isn't just about saying thank you. It's about making sure we live up to our promises. That means quality healthcare at the VA. That means good jobs when they come home. That means support for families who've sacrificed alongside them.I'm fighting in Congress to make sure our veterans get the full benefits they've earned and deserve - not cuts, not delays, just what they were promised.If you're a veteran struggling to access your benefits, my office can help. Call us at (513) 810-7988.To every veteran reading this: thank you for your service to our country.Appreciate you,Greg 💙🙏 | | Landsman for Congress PO Box 413 Cincinnati, OH 45201 United States | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

| | Hi, This is Brigadier General James Emory Mace, U.S. Army (Retired). _**Today, I write to you not as a soldier... _but as a father._**_ I'm a **Purple Heart** veteran, and I’ve seen battle. I’ve worn the uniform. I’ve buried friends who never made it home. **And I’ve felt the sting of a Nation that sometimes forgets what our sacrifices were for.** _**[But my daughter—Congresswoman Nancy Mace—never forgot.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/hwR-1jOy2Owc1kP3ldSwQM4vO712HeAzH2J7ber-jtuUcZEW_wRhtlSxcODcNa6qoyHNNLHiwweyyg43PaikMsQm00rAEoe2kujZ5s1JF-xfsOhIHzLN9Q8eg8S502rW2ABbchMRbbG5eVu4sJMMSCpaTRCdw3y3uu_IDKzMznm9pLbNsAxW4tCGUq15dOZyjLGx8bgNNxu2Fm3PJ-TVj2bM5UTxHaIpWQBdEFhRokKxQNcytCXDzY15vZgROg1fxIjvRdUWh4u4D9uqTynyXLAWjObbCCcRErBiGffToIiPBh3JpHd70uHhhyoCouCNT16p8WiKO0zNctpfQKQJiLsyRSlA_48H-1j19KjrY-UlvKzwgm0IdbmbccngUQmN3BXaBTu8xNfDQeYT5dtUPK8VNWtsRVdIg4UgH9oxQGzy-4kAjn_4RVd1W5X4abY6xZLndKKm1eqPyvwURQEQjV_esfwVAD80iYWy5nHMXb8NZvHjWubfRzw79Acpa1d8O6WtAXvblUYpL1eKikrDI3Ff3hKcBSG0U7GYK_gpc8oVr-KBHYMlQZWwalux3GRBTrAt_bxbk5rx4c6hGFfSI-WHuwt7DA9mv71J6EjITxvgpGIAQ9T30ughrjw_O4A7hN_AqpvU1hLCDmHLpDe-LcX56OzVJGgseF7Zksj5lya4RkPXFSmpABEJxg4hQCvWAxRUXqUQH8EHrwv2bbkXZ9tCaIzsHx15PXAK3mfaKHMDsCvcAxp8CAlVRb4-dCDxV8e2W61qAYSPH-wchsBk-nCsxmdFHBDVBUhPZBpRmeQz4X14Nys_hpCDSjwihUjvulJKwK28EkhdxRnW961zXmwZzID-bMcdJc_12dBVRKyd4HR7zT7CmPhPLkInD1vLgopn/GbmLjPrM6YkcYz0HSIlBF38wmypihBOQ/14)**_ Nancy was raised in the shadow of the flag.
