[](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=8yqgrk1q05h10vyrockpfgeg9m2y2911sgpwntzn4hlw9wdc7ffmdztfik95x3yu5uao32txdqf6uz74k92gi0d8bkgqfzrzqmiscc7yrazomk6fqf9wp8ai1kaix6x80tmwpys4yjs77atwhbk29izee5ju7t2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5kq7z&__onlt=h)
| | Not long ago, Dr. Shafir Botner, director of **MAGEN DAVID ADOM** ’s paramedic school and a Medevac helicopter paramedic, was treating injured civilians at the scene of a rocket strike in Be’er Sheva, Israel, when he looked up and recognized a familiar face. There, working alongside the **MAGEN DAVID ADOM** team to assist the injured civilians was Chief Inspector Or Yosef of the Israel Police. The last time Dr. Botner had seen him, Inspector Yosef was fighting for his life after being**********critically wounded by an RPG** while helping civilians during the Nova Music Festival massacre on October 7, 2023. A **MAGEN DAVID ADOM** paramedic was treating the inspector when he realized Yosef would not survive long enough to make it to the hospital in his ambulance. So, he immediately called for a helicopter. When Dr. Botner and his crew landed, they quickly loaded Inspector Yosef into the helicopter. **[They knew every second mattered](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=8yqgrk1q05h10vyrockpfgeg9m2y2911sgpwntzn4hlw9wdc7ffmdztfik95x3yu5uao32txdqf6uz74k92gi0d8bkgqfzrzqmiscc7yrazomk6fqf9wp8ai1kaix6x80tmwpys4yjs77atwhbk29izee5ju7t2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5kq7z&__onlt=h)****.** __“He was in very serious condition and had lost a massive amount of blood.__ __I did everything I could for him.”__ But now, this patient who so nearly died on October 7 was not only still alive, he was also outside helping others. Seeing Inspector Yosef up on his feet and back on the job filled Dr. Botner with emotion. __“Or Yosef is truly an inspiration. To return to the field after such a devastating injury and help others injured in a missile attack — that’s extraordinary.”__ ******** I wish you could go with me sometime when I visit the **MAGEN DAVID ADOM** National Dispatch Center just outside Tel Aviv or one of the 206 **MAGEN DAVID ADOM** emergency medical stations located across Israel. There you will encounter some of the most extraordinary men and women you may ever meet. There is something about the determination and compassion I see in their faces that always moves me. They are there to save lives.
---
[HELP SAVE LIVES IN ISRAEL ►](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=8yqgrk1q05h10vyrockpfgeg9m2y2911sgpwntzn4hlw9wdc7ffmdztfik95x3yu5uao32txdqf6uz74k92gi0d8bkgqfzrzqmiscc7yrazomk6fqf9wp8ai1kaix6x80tmwpys4yjs77atwhbk29izee5ju7t2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5kq7z&__onlt=h)
**It takes grit and guts to do what they do every day.** When a call comes in, they respond without hesitation — missiles may be falling, active shooters may be on the scene, buildings may be burning, but they are committed to going above and beyond to save as many lives as possible, even if it means putting their own lives on the line. Again and again, these paramedics, EMTs, and first responders rise above fear, push beyond limits, and stand in the gap. Their bravery, their sacrifice, their relentless dedication — it’s nothing less than extraordinary. **__May I ask you today to[give to support these exceptional women and men](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=8yqgrk1q05h10vyrockpfgeg9m2y2911sgpwntzn4hlw9wdc7ffmdztfik95x3yu5uao32txdqf6uz74k92gi0d8bkgqfzrzqmiscc7yrazomk6fqf9wp8ai1kaix6x80tmwpys4yjs77atwhbk29izee5ju7t2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5kq7z&__onlt=h)?__** **MAGEN DAVID ADOM** relies almost entirely upon private donations and not government funding — which means the people of Israel are counting on the faithful financial support of generous friends like you so that help is able to come in moments of dire need. [Your gift](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=8yqgrk1q05h10vyrockpfgeg9m2y2911sgpwntzn4hlw9wdc7ffmdztfik95x3yu5uao32txdqf6uz74k92gi0d8bkgqfzrzqmiscc7yrazomk6fqf9wp8ai1kaix6x80tmwpys4yjs77atwhbk29izee5ju7t2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5kq7z&__onlt=h) will provide the medical supplies and equipment, blood reserves, and emergency vehicles that these extraordinary modern-day heroes must have to save every man, woman, and child possible. God bless you,
| |
---
Catherine Reed Chief Executive Officer
[GIVE TO SAVE LIVES ►](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=8yqgrk1q05h10vyrockpfgeg9m2y2911sgpwntzn4hlw9wdc7ffmdztfik95x3yu5uao32txdqf6uz74k92gi0d8bkgqfzrzqmiscc7yrazomk6fqf9wp8ai1kaix6x80tmwpys4yjs77atwhbk29izee5ju7t2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5kq7z&__onlt=h)
| |
---
| |
---
| | |
---
**MAGEN DAVID ADOM** is Israel’s emergency services system, providing critical medical care and ambulance services for victims of terror, natural disasters, automobile accidents, and all other emergencies in Israel. It is also responsible for Israel’s national blood supply. **MAGEN DAVID ADOM** saves lives in Israel every day. Become a [Lifeline Partner](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=h2chmc2p50d4a0zjwhyg2vc7f5sprk3k2drytek0l5cynb6y1qt7d0i1ea93peq8vb8x0d2omivzzducdu7t0xvjmhvutd7i7129pci95xha1fhqy47r7a43akombt0wxq790x75tfhp6lf1jlbwxe8wfh&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5kq7z&__onlt=h) now.
[Unsubscribe](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xul=zkl8p045sz1uh88qpcsbcn9r38lc9iywv1kblxvyudut0inij0ut5dl1l6i0x5xxai5ckqtl7hn5b3ne680a1z33renk5j5m9ph8j6121m3jc&__stmp=t5kq7z&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=rd06mgksptintwg97dvhiumvkol5fh1uorl6m7z34it43iq14awzr3eqq8nxubvi7z0xojx7owkcgyjouzv77oh5c0a3ou64923d4qhyc2fq9mxhep8813hcx68yfy8qchpa0tm8sbtq8q9cqljy&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5kq7z&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](https://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=edb8jn9ebfukfforvlvcotst6pklhpm0g04qgxlhdv0xp5w26b97qs7luo1cx1pvewxxj3jy33o9az8zfvnmxoq21wa8drivbwwafo0fjn9yewuczmg1l7on5v4hbjqesy4yaf4pl&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5kq7z&__onlt=h)

name: Lisa (personal)
subject: The epitome of Bright Hope
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Senate
body:
Because of our veterans, we have ensured protections to live our everyday lives.

You received this message from Lisa Blunt Rochester because you've previously taken action and supported Democrats like Lisa. If you would like to get less email, **[click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119092936/581910784/1079316600?source=LOC_EM_NOFR_2025.11.11_VeteransDay_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_RS-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2U2NzI5Zi0yOWJmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J1ZrdVEl3VfS4AvRAlY_DcFNrgt71Ssp7y50ECpKdes=&emci=7155ce12-72be-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=03e6729f-29bf-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=11913588)** To unsubscribe, **[click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/_6DeEby01kOvxTWj8qzW6A2?unsubscribedata=zhMR9ar6asmAAyJ5wwoaZWCln215eZSR9sXjSOhKGpv51QxfWuKgllL%2Beb3k%2Fhk%2FksJeBX44fJls0B%2Fl9zeuX4A9CBB4o2rT5u9CvInhj%2F4EVS63%2BD088Mr3%2FMQTsfSlHKmwY%2FOpTVPIaVM8xUtiVQt1PH0Npq99Dj%2FmtgvSOFTaRZN6ozU7c9t6XQeAHVFkrTEH6tBv7vXOxqywwnXbvUZTtOiy2TYao%2F39IQ1y8sgqDcYVgPIAjgdsjtVI8pOc%2FDxbdgb1Z9dVZeupMkRQm0ofkRO7S6YLUMnjmyGQS6y9oBAamB5gpwYjqKmyl9dS6G4z1kp3akMwnfPuqhfCtEIPkdtxZ9BG1qOpahZ4HpiIYgRC4P611V1%2BUCGDWkuhTXj7uPDKrtI8uuR99%2B%2BdFhml6UA%2FklAYVO8%2Bes6mTGxr8gPpMCqtsT29felvcdOH)**
---
| | Folks, Happy Veterans Day. Today, we celebrate and honor all the brave veterans who have fought for our freedom to protect the country we call home. We offer our most sincere gratitude for all the sacrifices they’ve made to make this world a safer place. Because of our veterans, we have ensured protections to live our everyday lives without fear, granting us a chance at a full and free life void of fear and danger. We could not be more grateful for their selflessness in service to our country. **They are the epitome of Bright Hope.** But our veterans deserve more than just gratitude and honor. And that starts with giving our veterans better health care services and mental health resources, greater access to affordable housing, and plenty of chances to be part of America’s growing workforce after leaving the service. So please, take a moment today to honor, reflect, and appreciate all veterans that are part of your life. And let’s continue to honor our veterans by doing the work to pay it forward. Lisa
---
* * *
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119092937/581910785/631174349?refcode=LOC_LBR_EM_FR_2025_Email-Footer&source=LOC_EM_NOFR_2025.11.11_VeteransDay_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_RS-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2U2NzI5Zi0yOWJmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J1ZrdVEl3VfS4AvRAlY_DcFNrgt71Ssp7y50ECpKdes=) I officially became the first woman and person of color to **_ever_** represent Delaware in the Senate. But even though our campaign is over, the work has just begun.

**Will you help Bright Hope take center stage in the Senate?** Lisa Blunt Rochester for Senate
PO BOX 9767
Wilmington, DE 19809
United States **[lisabluntrochester.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119092938/581910786/1956491157?source=LOC_EM_NOFR_2025.11.11_VeteransDay_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_RS-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2U2NzI5Zi0yOWJmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J1ZrdVEl3VfS4AvRAlY_DcFNrgt71Ssp7y50ECpKdes=&emci=7155ce12-72be-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=03e6729f-29bf-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=11913588) | [info@lisabluntrochester.com](mailto:info@lisabluntrochester.com)** | Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Senate

You received this message from Lisa Blunt Rochester because you've previously taken action and supported Democrats like Lisa. If you would like to get less email, To unsubscribe, | | Folks, Happy Veterans Day. Today, we celebrate and honor all the brave veterans who have fought for our freedom to protect the country we call home. We offer our most sincere gratitude for all the sacrifices they’ve made to make this world a safer place. Because of our veterans, we have ensured protections to live our everyday lives without fear, granting us a chance at a full and free life void of fear and danger. We could not be more grateful for their selflessness in service to our country. They are the epitome of Bright Hope. But our veterans deserve more than just gratitude and honor. And that starts with giving our veterans better health care services and mental health resources, greater access to affordable housing, and plenty of chances to be part of America’s growing workforce after leaving the service. So please, take a moment today to honor, reflect, and appreciate all veterans that are part of your life. And let’s continue to honor our veterans by doing the work to pay it forward. Lisa | = I officially became the first woman and person of color to ever represent Delaware in the Senate. But even though our campaign is over, the work has just begun. # [White House in Ruins: Trump's Hidden Asbestos Scandal](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=178552979&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc4NTUyOTc5LCJpYXQiOjE3NjI4ODczNjksImV4cCI6MTc2NTQ3OTM2OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.H-WUKC2QzKWSBFOg8LY-2ZqudPSzV7gTBdHMWSZ4__c)
### Private donors, revoked licenses, and toxic dust--David Shuster exposes how Trump's East Wing project is poisoning more than the air.
| | [David Shuster](https://substack.com/@davidshuster) and [Blue Amp](https://substack.com/@blueamp)
---
| Nov 11
---
| [](https://substack.com/@davidshuster)| | [](https://substack.com/@blueamp)
---|---|---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=178552979&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc4NTUyOTc5LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2Mjg4NzM2OSwiZXhwIjoxNzY1NDc5MzY5LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzcyMjUzMiIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.6s9A2Sym3Kx4s9_XPOXluH5nPzt1iniFMm3Qe8JTn-s&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=178552979&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc4NTUyOTc5LCJpYXQiOjE3NjI4ODczNjksImV4cCI6MTc2NTQ3OTM2OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.H-WUKC2QzKWSBFOg8LY-2ZqudPSzV7gTBdHMWSZ4__c&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=178552979&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc4NTUyOTc5LCJpYXQiOjE3NjI4ODczNjksImV4cCI6MTc2NTQ3OTM2OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.H-WUKC2QzKWSBFOg8LY-2ZqudPSzV7gTBdHMWSZ4__c)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/blueamp/p/an-east-wing-asbestos-pit-thanks?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5974f134-6d66-451c-ac50-51b70df0de8d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cca2ab14-f8d2-4138-acc6-12c37a5d2445?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_**By David Shuster**_
There is clearly no institution that Donald Trump cannot and will not defile, merely by contact. The latest outrage is the White House East Wing demolition project. It remains wrapped in secrecy, funded by plutocrats, and executed with the scientific precision of a back-alley car crash. The site is currently a dusty construction pit.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/05a61a0b-e66a-446e-9b02-842aa6354b59?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
But the visual blight is just the start. There are multiple reports that the contractors handpicked by the Trump team, played dice with asbestos, that quiet killer of lungs and reason alike. The main contract company, ACECO, had its asbestos license revoked in 2022. Today, the company (and the Trump White House) refuse to provide any evidence establishing that proper asbestos abatement occurred.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cca2ab14-f8d2-4138-acc6-12c37a5d2445?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d55eb63e-61d5-483d-942c-3f24d72babd0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Asbestos was widely used in building projects at the time of the East Wing's 1902 construction and 1942 renovation.
The Trump administration's spokespeople, trained in the dark art of saying nothing at marching band volume, assure us that proper safety precautions and protocols have been followed. Of course, the spokespeople offer no proof, just the same Trumpian confidence that built casinos on sand in Atlantic city, called it genius, and then followed a Trump plan that ended in bankruptcy.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4abbeacd-2134-4b00-a991-95ac88685e52?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The fact that the East Wing demolition and ballroom construction are being funded by "private donors" is an irony that even Satan would envy. The list of donors/benefactors--tech moguls, media companies, defense barons, crypto hucksters--reads like a seating chart for the apocalypse. The Trump suck-ups buy a ballroom, Trump buys their silence, and the American taxpayer gets unmitigated asbestos, or inhales it while walking along and taking pictures of 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue.
* * *
Subscribe for more Shuster in your inbox.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.ltLpXvzragYVQJQSMicJxVf_dOalEHa1LKgEudju5Yg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=178552979)
* * *
The East Wing, we must not forget, is not just drywall and pipes. It is history. But to Trump, history is something to bulldoze, preferably before the lawyers and health inspectors arrive. Trump's development approach is simple -- tear it down, slap your name on the rubble, and call it "the best in the world." The nation's White House is becoming just another Trump property, complete with tacky gold fixtures, hidden hazards, and the lingering smell of deceit.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6946eb4c-78aa-4b6d-a99f-a6593dd331e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The administration's attitude toward safety laws is vintage Trumpism: rules are for the little people. Federal asbestos regulations? Bureaucratic "nonsense." Worker protections? "Overregulation." Transparency? "Fake news." And so, we have the spectacle of construction workers in hard hats silenced by non-disclosure agreements, inspectors gagged, and the air around the White House swirling with dust and duplicity.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/db6bbac6-b766-442c-83ba-ed7925a99778?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Let's be clear. Asbestos is not a faint threat. It is a known killer: inhaled fibers, long latency periods, mesothelioma, and lung cancer. The mere possibility that demolition without transparent abatement might have released plumes of fiber into the air should chill any sane citizen.
The potential asbestos problem is not just a danger for White House staff and Treasury building personnel adjacent to the construction site. Much of the east wing debris was hauled off to East Potomac Park and dumped alongside a public golf course.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6f95d90b-9069-4df4-be42-35c3ff739cfb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Naturally, if anyone falls ill from asbestos exposure. Trump and his team will blame "political enemies."
The White House East Wing's destruction is not a renovation; it is a metaphor. This is governance as demolition: pulverize what came before, lie about the debris, and bill the taxpayers for the cleanup and the potential lawsuits.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bf566d01-1534-4e3a-9248-51a03fe6815b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
When future historians sift through the ruins of this Trump era, they will find not just asbestos but the moral residue of a nation that mistook swagger for leadership and deceit for competence. They will note that a lunatic President, faced with the simple duty of stewardship, instead chose the only trade he ever truly mastered: the confidence game.
The White House should stand as a symbol of integrity. Under Trump, it is merely another construction site where truth goes to die beneath a layer of toxic dust. And when the coughing begins--literal or civic--we should remember that it was not the asbestos that killed us, but the Trump arrogance.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cca2ab14-f8d2-4138-acc6-12c37a5d2445?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bbd7cc8c-fd40-4e18-be40-1428f22b5ea6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

name: Todd Young
subject: We need to restore service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Todd Young
body:
[https://secure.winred.com/todd-young/results-email-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20251111_results_jm&utm_term=lrm-active]

Friend, when I first raised my hand as a United States Marine, I swore
an oath to defend this country, because I believe in service before
self.

That oath changed my life. It taught me that duty, honor, and
sacrifice aren’t just words, they're a way of living.

But somewhere along the way, Washington forgot that.

WHILE THE FAR LEFT WASTES TIME ON POLITICAL STUNTS AND PARTISAN CHAOS,
I’M FOCUSED ON ONE MISSION: DELIVERING RESULTS FOR THE AMERICAN
PEOPLE. BUT IN ORDER TO CONTINUE MY WORK, I RELY ON GRASSROOTS SUPPORT
FROM CONSERVATIVE PATRIOTS. WILL YOU CONSIDER CHIPPING IN A DONATION
TODAY?
[https://secure.winred.com/todd-young/results-email-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20251111_results_jm&utm_term=lrm-active]

DONATE
[https://secure.winred.com/todd-young/results-email-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20251111_results_jm&utm_term=lrm-active]

I didn’t run for the Senate to be part of the political theatrics
and chaos. I ran to restore a sense of duty to public service, to put
the mission first and deliver for the American people.

_That means standing up to the far left’s reckless spending and
open-border agenda._

_It means rebuilding America’s strength in the face of an
increasingly aggressive Chinese Communist Party._

_It means ensuring our children inherit a nation defined by hard work,
freedom, and opportunity - not political chaos._

Those are the values I learned in the Marines, and they’re the same
values I bring to the Senate every single day.

BUT I CAN’T MOVE FORWARD ALONE. THE ENTRENCHED POLITICAL CLASS IN
WASHINGTON WOULD LOVE NOTHING MORE THAN TO SEE LEADERS LIKE ME PUSHED
ASIDE.

If you believe America deserves leaders who put service before self,
I’m asking you to join me in this mission.

PLEASE CONSIDER A CONTRIBUTION OF $25, $50, OR EVEN $100 OR MORE TODAY
TO FUEL OUR FIGHT FOR AN AMERICA THAT STILL HONORS DUTY, INTEGRITY,
AND HARD WORK.
[https://secure.winred.com/todd-young/results-email-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20251111_results_jm&utm_term=lrm-active]

CHIP IN $25
[https://secure.winred.com/todd-young/results-email-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20251111_results_jm&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=25]

CHIP IN $50
[https://secure.winred.com/todd-young/results-email-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20251111_results_jm&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=50]

CHIP IN $100
[https://secure.winred.com/todd-young/results-email-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20251111_results_jm&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=100]

CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT
[https://secure.winred.com/todd-young/results-email-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20251111_results_jm&utm_term=lrm-active]

Every dollar you give strengthens our movement and helps remind
Washington who they work for: the American people.

Thank you for standing with me.

Yours in service,

Todd Young

I’m Todd Young. I grew up in Indiana, served as a Marine Corps

name: Jen Kiggans
subject: Before you go to bed tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
If you only read one thing before you head to bed tonight, please do me the honor by making it this...

If you only read one thing before you head to bed tonight, please do me the honor by making it this...[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrrk0db7i0027ejoe7083fpi0e230scgbk3q31ro_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cjg64o36cdh2bs)Friend, it's Jen Kiggans, and if you haven't met me yet, I'd really love to introduce myself. It'll only take a minute or two.
[I come from a long line of veterans, so it wasn't a surprise when I felt called to serve as a Navy helicopter pilot in the Persian Gulf. ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zok9dvjjfqvq0qdfc17j42il5csphhv483kt8v68_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cjg64o36cdh2bs)My grandpa served in the Navy during WWII as a postman. My dad served during the Vietnam War as a Green Beret and retired as a Colonel. My husband is a retired F/A-18 pilot in the Navy, flying in Iraq and Afghanistan. And now, I'm a Navy mom, too!
As a Navy veteran serving in Congress, [service](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zosfsgaa10jp8ds4bons9e85e78973hidhmjbcng_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cjg64o36cdh2bs) is more than simply voting "yea" or "nay." It's about rolling up your sleeves, doing the research, listening to your neighbors, and dedicating every day to making our country better and stronger.
Now that I've been in Congress for two years, I can say with total certainty that whatever you think of the DC Swamp and its creatures, it's even WORSE than what you're imagining. For too long, egos and power struggles have stopped Washington politicians from creating meaningful change for hard-working families.
It's like once these spineless politicians win their elections, they stop caring about the people who elected them to serve and represent them. [They'll say anything to get elected, but then they sell their vote to the highest bidder!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze8cbleb8csmcvvbfqi87i98fpco230qfkvfo0n0_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cjg64o36cdh2bs)
My mission in Washington is the same as when I served in the Navy: [To protect and serve America](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zda161oghuks61d7a5glh0nned8jtr1ph77asjgg_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cjg64o36cdh2bs). In fact, when you're being sworn into Congress or the Armed Forces, the oath starts the same:
"I will support and defend the Constitution of the United States against all enemies, foreign and domestic."
The career politicians would do well to reflect on those words when reporting for work in DC and at home.
Service - especially to our country - has guided me my whole life, and I've been lucky to be surrounded by veterans who hold that same value so dear. [Please support a Navy veteran who is dedicated to our country and our shared conservative values to make sure the Republican Party is delivering for YOU, Friend.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr77dcdujif7g25voh1oap9nf7vthmvmg3qmm8cg_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cjg64o36cdh2bs)[DONATE $10 >>
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zleokplo9564qo49t8cpne2itjou31mbaf65uk58_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cjg64o36cdh2bs)[DONATE $20 >>
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjctq1k06u4abk51snc6gberf5f370oug08vdqu8_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cjg64o36cdh2bs)[DONATE $30 >>
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3fr8rtdcjpe3ctb18hfs1fc2de923htsfk4sjf8_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cjg64o36cdh2bs)[DONATE ANYTHING >>
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlr0crc4vb9sfg1qkkop4toc692b0nbiaprkeka8_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cjg64o36cdh2bs)I know this was a long email, so from the bottom of my heart, [THANK YOU](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1f49rcbisv530aimsg43pkh436t59buaqml44sg_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cjg64o36cdh2bs) for reading my story!
-Jen Kiggans

subject: I’m counting on your support more than ever before

body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119093133/581911588/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWYyMjRjZC0yYWJmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d2i2-p_IA2Yyryfmd5-Jq6WoMcuQ8nUIM2mHr0qc_7A=)
Friends, it’s Robert Garcia.
California just stepped up to stop the GOP’s attempt to rig the Congressional map in order to secure another term in power.
_We rejected the old playbook that lets billionaires and power brokers dictate everything — including congressional maps and election rules — to benefit themselves._
And now, with the election year just around the corner, the fight is on. This new landscape is our chance to show what democracy should actually look like. **But it also means I’m running in an entirely new and more competitive district and launching a brand new campaign.**
[**That’s why I’m asking you to spare just 30 seconds to watch my launch video below — and then chip in $5, $10, or more to help our campaign hit the ground running and raise the resources we need to keep fighting for Californians in Congress. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119093135/581911590/789508428?refcode=251111_RG_camapaign-launch2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWYyMjRjZC0yYWJmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d2i2-p_IA2Yyryfmd5-Jq6WoMcuQ8nUIM2mHr0qc_7A=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119093137/581911592/789508428?refcode=251111_RG_camapaign-launch2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWYyMjRjZC0yYWJmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d2i2-p_IA2Yyryfmd5-Jq6WoMcuQ8nUIM2mHr0qc_7A=)
[WATCH NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119093139/581911594/-309737922?refcode=251111_RG_camapaign-launch2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWYyMjRjZC0yYWJmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d2i2-p_IA2Yyryfmd5-Jq6WoMcuQ8nUIM2mHr0qc_7A=)
I’m running for Congress because I’ve lived the dream this country promises.
My mom brought me here, took every risk so I could succeed, and I saw firsthand how hard work and hope should matter more than who you know or how much money you have in the bank.
This race is about more than one seat. It’s about saying loud and clear that working people should come first, not billionaires who already own the game or lobbyists writing laws behind closed doors.
**And in the face of intense change, in this competitive new district, we aren’t shrinking. We’re showing up. We’re organizing. And we’re winning.**
[**But we can’t do it without you. Your support today means we can build the campaign that matches the moment. If you believe in a district where your vote counts and your voice matters, then stand with me by chipping in $5, $10, or more right away. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119093141/581911596/789508428?refcode=251111_RG_camapaign-launch2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWYyMjRjZC0yYWJmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d2i2-p_IA2Yyryfmd5-Jq6WoMcuQ8nUIM2mHr0qc_7A=)
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119093143/581911598/-309737922?refcode=251111_RG_camapaign-launch2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWYyMjRjZC0yYWJmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d2i2-p_IA2Yyryfmd5-Jq6WoMcuQ8nUIM2mHr0qc_7A=)
Thank you,
Robert

name: Team Cooper HQ
subject: Back to basics
body:
With you.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1898?t=1&akid=40%2E124072%2E7ih9CW)
Peter, we all know that we won’t win this toss-up race without getting this campaign back to basics. To the issues that _matter_ to folks in North Carolina and beyond. The fact is, most of us are fed up with the way things are going in Washington. Politicians are playing games with our _lives,_ while their rich donors get richer at our expense. **Roy Cooper’s not going to stand for that.** He’s ready to fight for the rights we count on. He’ll do everything possible to make health care more affordable and accessible. And he’ll support policies that create jobs and opportunity across the country. _Just like he did as Governor._ **[If this is a campaign you can believe in, we need you to _invest_ in it, Peter. Our mid-November fundraising deadline is on Friday, and we need to raise at least $100,000 online between now and then. Anything you can pitch in would help.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1925?t=6&akid=40%2E124072%2E7ih9CW)** Look, we’re proud that more than 90% of donors to this campaign give $100 or less. Folks everywhere are stepping up with support, and _Roy couldn’t be more grateful._ [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1925?t=7&akid=40%2E124072%2E7ih9CW) While Roy’s going to win this toss-up race by connecting with people on the issues that matter, our opponent is calling on his Big Oil buddies and fellow D.C. insiders to prop up his campaign. _In fact, powerful Senate Republicans are already attacking Roy on his behalf._ Look, we can win this, Peter. We have the right candidate and a winning message. We know what we need to do. But our MAGA opponent is rising in the polls by the day, so we have to be prepared to take him on dollar for dollar. **[Roy needs your help now. Pitch in to help hit our mid-month fundraising goal so we can turn the tide of this toss-up race>>>](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1925?t=8&akid=40%2E124072%2E7ih9CW)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1926?t=9&akid=40%2E124072%2E7ih9CW)

Team Cooper

Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

name: Jen Kiggans
subject: Before you go to bed tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
If you only read one thing before you head to bed tonight, please do me the honor by making it this...

If you only read one thing before you head to bed tonight, please do me the honor by making it this...[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdf3n6fhff2e7akkag6859kmq4ebui84ndit44bo_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cjg64p75cph2bs)Friend, it's Jen Kiggans, and if you haven't met me yet, I'd really love to introduce myself. It'll only take a minute or two.
[I come from a long line of veterans, so it wasn't a surprise when I felt called to serve as a Navy helicopter pilot in the Persian Gulf. ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf7u2uokhta55e37s3ng8f6qtpg16alglfvsc7v0_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cjg64p75cph2bs)My grandpa served in the Navy during WWII as a postman. My dad served during the Vietnam War as a Green Beret and retired as a Colonel. My husband is a retired F/A-18 pilot in the Navy, flying in Iraq and Afghanistan. And now, I'm a Navy mom, too!
As a Navy veteran serving in Congress, [service](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbd90u9mjfq33ne65o3l1ff2eehap5me99e0t7fg_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cjg64p75cph2bs) is more than simply voting "yea" or "nay." It's about rolling up your sleeves, doing the research, listening to your neighbors, and dedicating every day to making our country better and stronger.
Now that I've been in Congress for two years, I can say with total certainty that whatever you think of the DC Swamp and its creatures, it's even WORSE than what you're imagining. For too long, egos and power struggles have stopped Washington politicians from creating meaningful change for hard-working families.
It's like once these spineless politicians win their elections, they stop caring about the people who elected them to serve and represent them. [They'll say anything to get elected, but then they sell their vote to the highest bidder!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbn9ge2vjls9h13q7obfoijnn3eqaueolm3masjg_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cjg64p75cph2bs)
My mission in Washington is the same as when I served in the Navy: [To protect and serve America](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt2ti9b7uu7nk8ijlar0finomm57cqueuvapgvt0_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cjg64p75cph2bs). In fact, when you're being sworn into Congress or the Armed Forces, the oath starts the same:
"I will support and defend the Constitution of the United States against all enemies, foreign and domestic."
The career politicians would do well to reflect on those words when reporting for work in DC and at home.
Service - especially to our country - has guided me my whole life, and I've been lucky to be surrounded by veterans who hold that same value so dear. [Please support a Navy veteran who is dedicated to our country and our shared conservative values to make sure the Republican Party is delivering for YOU, Friend.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za6qv13i81pdpq39uot62ovnmk8lk4u3991rm5i0_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cjg64p75cph2bs)[DONATE $10 >>
](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5l08h1kfnh5d15i3m1eitl9o87mdt030vfge3ag_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cjg64p75cph2bs)[DONATE $20 >>
](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zh1k6q8gsshpl8tf9mjo6a3ec78o7qcpopqtk8ho_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cjg64p75cph2bs)[DONATE $30 >>
](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zog6eml4fd5lrp2uis680ip0s4reuttiuau3dug8_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cjg64p75cph2bs)[DONATE ANYTHING >>
](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztbub0vcd67drdsn2ias3unk1c0sg12tuq8ikqd0_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cjg64p75cph2bs)I know this was a long email, so from the bottom of my heart, [THANK YOU](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zis3q4os0rjssam78tm9464oa2ms5r135r36r6d0_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cjg64p75cph2bs) for reading my story!
-Jen Kiggans

body:
If you only read one thing before you head to bed tonight, please do me the honor by making it this...

If you only read one thing before you head to bed tonight, please do me the honor by making it this...[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9ilbcgjlgj244df6n0u6d39mul082cab7bb3hlo_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cjg64p75cph2bs)Friend, it's Jen Kiggans, and if you haven't met me yet, I'd really love to introduce myself. It'll only take a minute or two.
[I come from a long line of veterans, so it wasn't a surprise when I felt called to serve as a Navy helicopter pilot in the Persian Gulf. ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znks8b8iqjnd8r23s0935p058gtqff4idbfc4mho_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cjg64p75cph2bs)My grandpa served in the Navy during WWII as a postman. My dad served during the Vietnam War as a Green Beret and retired as a Colonel. My husband is a retired F/A-18 pilot in the Navy, flying in Iraq and Afghanistan. And now, I'm a Navy mom, too!
As a Navy veteran serving in Congress, [service](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zaf2jmomf5knon7g8ses59f9d3tfe21g1ki55uhg_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cjg64p75cph2bs) is more than simply voting "yea" or "nay." It's about rolling up your sleeves, doing the research, listening to your neighbors, and dedicating every day to making our country better and stronger.
Now that I've been in Congress for two years, I can say with total certainty that whatever you think of the DC Swamp and its creatures, it's even WORSE than what you're imagining. For too long, egos and power struggles have stopped Washington politicians from creating meaningful change for hard-working families.
It's like once these spineless politicians win their elections, they stop caring about the people who elected them to serve and represent them. [They'll say anything to get elected, but then they sell their vote to the highest bidder!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3k14t40hf60g68cuammrm4lsjeb5bvl6u56mvko_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cjg64p75cph2bs)
My mission in Washington is the same as when I served in the Navy: [To protect and serve America](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhv0rjmh6apeumh5nu7fqltti71rhe9mmu3tuma8_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cjg64p75cph2bs). In fact, when you're being sworn into Congress or the Armed Forces, the oath starts the same:
"I will support and defend the Constitution of the United States against all enemies, foreign and domestic."
The career politicians would do well to reflect on those words when reporting for work in DC and at home.
Service - especially to our country - has guided me my whole life, and I've been lucky to be surrounded by veterans who hold that same value so dear. [Please support a Navy veteran who is dedicated to our country and our shared conservative values to make sure the Republican Party is delivering for YOU, Friend.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsqghnb3m3vhanj64gki3ub0r8i7cn6hnldqllug_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cjg64p75cph2bs)[DONATE $10 >>

](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0m3k653ssh20jq3hpr3pdsl5unaohtrpquuodq8_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cjg64p75cph2bs)[DONATE $30 >>
](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrvcud5e2ck20fqdhhpl6m0977sqkm76hg1ju7v0_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cjg64p75cph2bs)[DONATE ANYTHING >>
](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze48ogcnjqni78j06b5urqgb1sakc64jtpbk7bho_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cjg64p75cph2bs)I know this was a long email, so from the bottom of my heart, [THANK YOU](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk6ulfedmd8j8teot4m3q9v2dj2nvjcuj5drf8hg_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cjg64p75cph2bs) for reading my story!

# Hello Capitalists,
### **Here is everything you should be following today:**
* Mamdani tilts hard left with his pick for chief of staff
* Elle Bisgaard-Church was behind the controversial social worker concept
* Bessent schools MSNBC over basic economics
* "Big Short" legend claims AI titans are cooking the books over profits
* SoftBank unloads their entire Nvidia holdings in one go
* Bitcoin's rally fizzles out before it really began

# Mamdani names Radical Socialist as his Chief of Staff
Zohran Mamdani, New York City's mayor-elect, **[has named](https://substack.com/redirect/b7e9fcc6-3d3b-44be-a928-1fe50bc913c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Elle Bisgaard-Church - the Democratic Socialists of America-affiliated "chief architect" of his controversial plan to replace NYPD officers with social workers for non-violent 911 calls - as his top City Hall adviser.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5895e229-9afd-432a-9945-321ffbfda869?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **DSA Radical Takes Helm:** Bisgaard-Church, a **[low-profile](https://substack.com/redirect/e9382625-4230-4e6f-adc4-fe43d68e6167?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Ivy League graduate and NYC DSA organizer, previously served as Mamdani's chief adviser in the state assembly and campaign.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/73c3dcc3-f4c6-4d30-a0f8-63b763da0388?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **$1.1B Police Overhaul Plan:** Her signature proposal creates a new Department of Community Safety, shifting non-life-threatening emergencies - especially subway incidents - to mental health professionals.
* **Heavy Criticism Expected:** The plan, developed with input from former NYPD chief Rodney Harrison, has been widely slammed amid Mamdani's history of anti-police rhetoric requiring public apologies.
* **Socialist Influence Deepens:** **[Bisgaard-Church](https://substack.com/redirect/73c3dcc3-f4c6-4d30-a0f8-63b763da0388?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** secured DSA's endorsement, held weekly strategy meetings with the group, and **[now joins Mamdani](https://substack.com/redirect/71dc298f-d81f-4161-bada-9aa7a6a70394?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to push his "affordability agenda" at City Hall.

* * *
* * *
**[Together with Allegiance Gold](https://substack.com/redirect/ecf1693d-cf88-4470-84cc-c2124df5c974?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# [Don't let the RMD trap limit your financial flexibility](https://substack.com/redirect/ecf1693d-cf88-4470-84cc-c2124df5c974?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ecf1693d-cf88-4470-84cc-c2124df5c974?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Most retirees take their Required Minimum Distributions (RMDs) in cash -- and that often means more for Washington and less for you. Once you reach a certain age, the IRS requires that you begin taking distributions from your retirement accounts, whether you need the money or not. **[For many retirees, this can feel like a forced withdrawal that interrupts their long-term plans for preserving wealth.](https://substack.com/redirect/f2c46fd6-6348-46e6-9978-d786390d492b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
However, few people realize there's another option available under IRS Code 408(m)(3). This provision allows certain types of precious metals, such as gold and silver, to be held within specific retirement accounts -- and in some cases, distributed in-kind rather than liquidated for cash. By understanding and utilizing this strategy, you can maintain greater control over your assets and potentially preserve more of your retirement's purchasing power.
**[The key is knowing how to structure your RMDs strategically](https://substack.com/redirect/ecf1693d-cf88-4470-84cc-c2124df5c974?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** -- and how physical assets like precious metals can play a role.
Don't let the RMD trap limit your financial flexibility. Discover how to use IRS Code 408(m)(3) to your advantage and make your retirement assets work smarter for you.
**[Learn how to avoid the RMD trap-- and keep more of what's yours in this free guide.](https://substack.com/redirect/ecf1693d-cf88-4470-84cc-c2124df5c974?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Claim your FREE guide here](https://substack.com/redirect/ecf1693d-cf88-4470-84cc-c2124df5c974?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
# Bessent bulldozes MSNBC hosts over economics and humiliates them
Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent **[fired back at MSNBC host Jonathan Lemire](https://substack.com/redirect/c9caaeec-9df6-4775-83d7-b5c02222aa93?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for claiming that America "bailed out" Argentina, scolding him and explaining that America profited from a currency swap that was mutually beneficial.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/cd4bacd7-9182-48c0-bff0-9bc59d19c477?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"How does a $20 billion bailout of Argentina help Americans?" Lemire asked.

"Do you know what a swap line is?" Bessent answered.
"It's a currency swap. Yes," the host responded.
"But what is that? Why would you call it a bailout?!" Bessent pressed back. "In most bailouts, you don't make money. The U.S. government made money. The government's going to make money ... There's a lot we could have been doing for American farmers. But Democrats CLOSED the government."
* * *
* * *
# Legendary investor claims massive AI earnings are a fraud
"Big Short" investor Michael Burry **[has accused](https://substack.com/redirect/6a8a3a85-4d17-4143-a495-151b0c09992f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** major AI hyperscalers Monday of committing "one of the more common frauds of the modern era" by artificially extending the useful lives of servers and Nvidia chips to understate depreciation and inflate earnings.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/da25b355-156d-4dba-96f5-76049b0142af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Aggressive Accounting Exposed:** Burry claims that Hyperscalers (Google, Meta, Oracle and others) have extended the "lives" of their assets (AI chips) on paper to 5-6 years, despite in reality needing a 2-3 year Nvidia chip replacement cycle, thus spreading depreciation out over more years to boost profits under Generally Accepted Accounting Principle (GAAP) rules.
* **Massive Earnings Inflation Looming:** The practice, according to Burry, enables Ai firms to understate depreciation in their accounts by $176 billion industry-wide from 2026-2028. This has meant that they were able to significantly overstate reported profits.
* **Oracle, Meta Hardest Hit:** According to Burry's calculations, Oracle's profits could be overstated by ~27% by 2028; Meta's by ~21%.
* **More Bombshells Incoming:** Burry promised "more detail" on the alleged manipulation in a follow-up post coming on November 25, telling followers to "stay tuned."

* * *
* * *
# SoftBank dumps its ENTIRE holdings of Nvidia for $5.38 billion
SoftBank has **[dumped its entire Nvidia stake](https://substack.com/redirect/2b8cf498-ad75-4807-94ae-c3b85d9c4479?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for $5.83 billion freeing up cash for a massive $22.5 billion bet on OpenAI as CEO Masayoshi Son goes all-in on artificial intelligence instead of chip manufacturing.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2b8cf498-ad75-4807-94ae-c3b85d9c4479?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Huge Profits Realized Again** : Softbank's "Vision Fund" \- an early investor in Nvidia- booked part of th $19 billion gain, helping SoftBank to double quarterly profits despite exiting Nvidia entirely.
* **Funding OpenAI Megadeal** : Proceeds, plus $9.17 billion from SoftBank's sale of T-Mobile shares, have fueled the $22.5 billion OpenAI infusion, which will boost SoftBank's stake in them from from 4% to 11%.
* **Not Bearish on Nvidia** : SoftBank's CFO insists sale is pure "asset monetization" for opportunities, not concern over AI valuations or bubble fears.
* **Ties to Nvidia Endure** : SoftBank remains deeply linked to Nvidia via the $500 billion Stargate AI data center project and heavy reliance on Nvidia chips.

* * *
* * *
# Bitcoin's rally fizzles out as concerns mount over "buyer fatigue"
Bitcoin's attempted recovery fizzled Monday as the cryptocurrency briefly surged past $107,000 before tumbling below $105,000, signaling deepening **["buyer fatigue"](https://substack.com/redirect/6880311a-b1bd-4cdd-984e-8c876055c752?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and fragile sentiment across crypto markets after last month's brutal selloff.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6880311a-b1bd-4cdd-984e-8c876055c752?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Whale Profits Trigger Downturn** : Early Bitcoin holders cashed in massive gains near yearly highs, fueling the selloff alongside October's cataclysmic liquidations.
* **Futures Momentum Evaporates Fast** : Open interest in Bitcoin perpetual contracts plunged to $68 billion from last month's $94 billion peak, with funding rates stuck flat.
* **ETF Inflows Virtually Vanish** : U.S.-listed Bitcoin ETFs scraped just $1 million in net inflows Monday, despite raging rallies in stocks and credit.
* **Key Resistance Blocks Upside** : Bitcoin remains trapped below its 200-day moving average near $110,000, lagging gold and tech stocks year-to-date.

name: Elise Stefanik

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elise for Governor

**_OFFICIAL ANNOUNCEMENT FROM REP. ELISE STEFANIK_**
---
Peter,
---
As one of my biggest grassroots supporters, I wanted to tell you this HUGE news personally...
---
**_I’m officially launching my campaign for governor of New York – and I’d like _YOU_ to be one of our very first Founding Members!_**
---

[ACCEPT YOUR
FOUNDING MEMBERSHIP >>](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bd7a10e295544673903b47025df8b950&_e=g7MPZ_FNS37wEvUXZ1qIjDiBrU_3mHoGLbMBFa4Wgw0qykWT0l-6UmrcaE0co5r_LAi2l4IAHJMr1V72PCG_LPZIANPc5xhP19Ni9G7Hs1rlP3gbz4QLjopI-HxGkshN9Q6rP9WCV5kQktJmcCtjaszwfLYUGZQjY8-JAI8kXC1xymVIA7u2aH5dKmh_tSzHyOL1w92bD2ajFTHRniP4bQLmg__Qd30a0x19vniiFGws8Wx0E6M_gB3Lxo9DjkLEYziKApPP3Flf8YZXmPq43rBgW6lXNXEy4HENvzoqS-9IXAjwd9_69e3g8oggC4X7oc9X6DPwp1SRKQ8kC_sX8BeFCvhbUHS4MgW7DJbSN8E1jMu6s9OvCDoYLh96LOum65CX9Ht7NyU1ONiji-qPhDO4L9F3axK7QyQcO0byLBRNQm0rQxdE6MvH4dCr0Kgf8yyNNNfS47sj-wnlPnqJ9ELlofW9rTZsTM3x-kJpTwXKlZvs4_0tsFUxGTiR3sJaVfJQ9KBbh1Ej9v7ac115hcUjw9gHVoy5YPlmMXIsmapoQx_fvNvIfPt7-FW1Okxg4Y6mGcdS7dIFO-T8_8NamiTrOJ9RvhOnB6am4fJ8KEW9VTKQCfct7lS98RLvQpbBWiw4Oy5EieurhzrjTF7ohw%3D%3D)
---

Kathy Hochul is the WORST governor in America, and she’s brought our once great state to its knees with her crippling taxes, crushing government regulations, and pro-criminal agenda.
---
__But her embrace of communist jihadi Zohran Mamdani was the FINAL straw.__
---
**As I watched the results come in on election night, I felt it was my duty to step up to the plate and fight with everything I have to SAVE New York from this communist takeover!**
---
This isn’t just another election, Peter.
---
**_It’s the _FINAL_ _BATTLE_ to SAVE New York before it’s lost forever!_**
---
Hochul will rubber stamp Mamdani’s dangerous communist agenda that seeks to abolish prisons, seize private property, drown us in taxes, let violent illegal aliens torment U.S. citizens, and tyrannically weaponize the power of the state against anyone who disagrees.
---
**But as the next Governor of New York, I will be the _FINAL_ _FIREWALL_ that protects New Yorkers from this insanity!**
---
We’re starting off in a strong position. Back-to-back polls just showed us with a _**ONE-POINT LEAD**_ – _and that’s before I even officially launched our campaign!_
---
As long as we raise the funds we need to fight back against Hochul’s attacks, cut through her multimillion-dollar ad buys, and get every last Republican to the polls, we have a clear path to victory.
---
That’s why the most important thing we can do right now is show a SURGE of grassroots support with thousands of Founding Members joining the ranks of our campaign.
---
Make no mistake, this will be the KEY to victory. Your support today could help us move one step closer to unlocking MILLIONS of dollars in matching funds from New York state!
---
**_That’s not a gimmick – it’s a REAL, authentic,_600% MATCH_!_**
---
When I’m sworn in as the next Governor of New York, I’ll know exactly who I have to thank...
---
**_Our Founding Members like _YOU_ who had my back on day one!_**
---
[**So please, make a contribution of ANY amount to become an official Founding Member of my gubernatorial campaign to FIRE Kathy Hochul – and help unlock a 600% MATCH.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bd7a10e295544673903b47025df8b950&_e=g7MPZ_FNS37wEvUXZ1qIjDiBrU_3mHoGLbMBFa4Wgw0qykWT0l-6UmrcaE0co5r_LAi2l4IAHJMr1V72PCG_LPZIANPc5xhP19Ni9G7Hs1rlP3gbz4QLjopI-HxGkshN9Q6rP9WCV5kQktJmcCtjaszwfLYUGZQjY8-JAI8kXC1xymVIA7u2aH5dKmh_tSzHyOL1w92bD2ajFTHRniP4bRkBDEvo3ylQoQlL5KQjgNzYdb452bM7Q7CsPHwf6PVeAAbe1FjyfX6KlgR1imGDbB5-vfXfGOW47KMiHvGhhvekXE7DCkcQQTQoJWD55ABOFjxgorzmGIlWf8NmqRkC6TmFWk1bVtfasvhpOxxl8mryYfE5Ohb05mqZs9XgYefKjEMU-2esm0t1Dz9PHk_OlX08YE5K6QiRkfGAG0jmndC4VfTsNWnPOSdSn2LovIGujj4xdrDqrzx5hnowzygs2joDmC5ElRwCn2-cXuYy5NaRWi1XS2hPkzer2OOFaiLqK-23p3qKemfqYtPFw--0vohi_LIAWQmfPsosANul2V6UPzCIPyB59jvnTqVDM67Z3ISlC3QydprWIIw-Uiqx0zRzP2LhR-ORzJ_7begAVdcFp6MhP7jHugJ3FHZ299x_J1IinoEoOFDrKtndoxeqGw%3D%3D)

name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: The momentum is on our side
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
Help us hit the ground running in 2026. |
---
Peter, Last Tuesday, voters across the country stood up to reject the corruption and extremism we’re seeing from Republican leaders. Voters in New York City elected progressive state representative Zohran Mamdani to be their next mayor. Voters in New Jersey and Virginia elected Mikie Sherrill and Abigail Spanberger, two Democratic women, to be their next governors in close races against far-right opponents. Voters in Georgia elected two Democrats to the Georgia Public Service Commission, the first statewide wins for Democrats in Georgia in 20 years. And after Donald Trump and Texas Republicans tried to rig our elections by creating gerrymandered maps, voters in California showed up to vote overwhelmingly in favor of new congressional district maps that will counteract the ones in Texas. Across the country, the message is clear: **voters are showing that this corrupt and extreme administration does not represent them.** [The momentum is on our side, Peter, but now we need to build it even more heading into the 2026 midterm elections. Voters in New York City elected progressive state representative Zohran Mamdani to be their next mayor. Voters in New Jersey and Virginia elected Mikie Sherrill and Abigail Spanberger, two Democratic women, to be their next governors in close races against far-right opponents. Voters in Georgia elected two Democrats to the Georgia Public Service Commission, the first statewide wins for Democrats in Georgia in 20 years. And after Donald Trump and Texas Republicans tried to rig our elections by creating gerrymandered maps, voters in California showed up to vote overwhelmingly in favor of new congressional district maps that will counteract the ones in Texas. Across the country, the message is clear: voters are showing that this corrupt and extreme administration does not represent them. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for standing with me, Yassamin Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

name: Wes Moore
subject: The most important lesson I took from my service
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=905%2E1086043%2EvjGCi3)
Peter,
When I deployed to Afghanistan as part of 82nd Airborne Division, I learned how to lead in times of crisis.
**In the Army, you learn what it means to serve — and serve with distinction.**
You figure out how to adapt to new challenges.
You disregard anything that could be a distraction from the mission at hand.
Never during my service did I ask one of my fellow soldiers who they voted for or what their political ideology was. **We’re there to serve our country, not ourselves or our party.**
And when our soldiers return home, they want to keep serving their country and community.
Many choose the path of federal employment. About 1 in 4 federal workers is a veteran, and over the last few months, I’ve gotten to know many of them well.
They inspect our food, discover cures for disease, keep planes from crashing, and protect communities from violent crime.
**But under President Trump, many of these veterans are now being shoved into the unemployment line.**
It’s hard to overstate the havoc wreaked by the Trump-Vance Administration’s workforce reductions.
In February, a report out of the House Appropriations Committee indicated that mass firings under Trump and Elon Musk’s DOGE Initiative eliminated nearly 6,000 veterans from their positions in the federal government.
In July, the V.A. reported that the agency was on pace to reduce staff by 30,000 this fall.
If we want to be a nation that makes “Thank you for your service” mean something again, we need to stop these widespread firings of federal employees and restore federal public servants’ faith in their government.
**These are my people.**
I am the governor of a state that’s home to over 260,000 federal workers and over 300,000 veterans. It’s not my job to look at their political beliefs and decide whether they’re worth helping. _It’s my job to help them, period._ And it sickens me that the Trump Administration is looking at them and saying, “You’re on your own.”
In Maryland, we’re proving there is a better way:
* Our Government Modernization Initiative has responsibly cut waste. We’ve delivered commonsense savings that preserve essential services by reducing the size of our car fleet and purchasing laptops and other devices more strategically – moves that are intentional and disciplined, but not very flashy for tweets and TikToks.
* I signed into law legislation that made Maryland the first state in the nation to establish a pathway for free health care and dental care to members of the National Guard.
* I expanded paid leave for those in uniform who also have positions in the state government.
* I gave young veterans the largest tax break in recent Maryland history.

_And we’re just getting started._
I joined the United States Army Reserves when I was seventeen years old.
I was so young that my mother had to sign the paperwork. My military experience laid the foundation for everything that came after for me, from starting and running my own small business, to a successful tenure as the CEO of one of the largest poverty-fighting organizations in the country, to being elected the 63rd Governor of Maryland and the first Black governor in our state’s history. It all started with lessons learned in the Army.
**We need to nurture those lessons in others with policies that honor our veterans’ hunger to serve.**
This Veterans Day, President Trump and his advisors would be wise to follow what we’ve done in Maryland to protect the job market, encourage service, and uplift our veteran community.
Elevate,
Wes
**[Donate ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251111-1.ovUaT3&refcode=em-20251111-1&t=4&akid=905%2E1086043%2EvjGCi3)**

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=5&akid=905%2E1086043%2EvjGCi3)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=905%2E1086043%2EvjGCi3)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: John James
subject: This oath doesn’t expire.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for MI, 35744 Van Dyke Avenue, Sterling Heights, MI 48312
body:
| | | Patriot – My oath didn’t end when I took off the uniform. When I graduated from West Point and raised my right hand, I swore an oath to defend the United States of America. **That oath didn’t come with an expiration date.** I led two Apache helicopter platoons during Operation Iraqi Freedom. I logged more than 750 combat flight hours in defense of our nation. _I saw the cost of freedom up close. I flew alongside brave men and women who gave everything they had so others could live free._ **That’s why Veterans Day isn’t just another holiday to me. It’s a reminder that the fight for America never truly ends. It only changes form.** Today, the threats we face don’t always wear a uniform. They come from politicians and bureaucrats who are trying to divide our country, weaken our military, and destroy the values that make America worth defending. **[That’s why I’m running for Governor. Because my mission of service didn’t stop when I came home.](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=89d6f29f2cd94e11a3fd441684ccf7ef&_e=A0aYg9r-BwaBXxM7ox5ScZxNmZHcLBJEXSQsDmT4r6ajgVuhGeBBSohmJCGrJ75ALal0yoRbNwh-v3JNA7va2Df6QSO-p6i4LFlpPP1kHTkz3BDkQTKDX-WfgUfCo-oH7WuAQ355Tg1yT62udNGGIlqPL1VJlM1S7VbNEwENCJL8JteVkD36qxCh2usY3BbFtQmMAGU5TKy_SHSiK9LAFKbFwMvlRahTWcI2SEdssKWk40ZPh03VotNzjAfATJJ2ZHpeZVVxQD1nGO07wpujd5eJRTf74SC_2KYJbkRDmuZY3Y-Xu5F0pxmFk80iFU6sd3pNDTZag_q9QZOH88bxazd6SKijX6ZPvWgatS1u7wIjxKst2mrL5JW4aMTo5MS-uZ-LtT0I7YcjuRNq-1SZbSFRT8-ZqIHfFikzROBKz4Y%3D)**
---
[ **STAND WITH A COMBAT VETERAN** ](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=89d6f29f2cd94e11a3fd441684ccf7ef&_e=A0aYg9r-BwaBXxM7ox5ScZxNmZHcLBJEXSQsDmT4r6ajgVuhGeBBSohmJCGrJ75ALal0yoRbNwh-v3JNA7va2Df6QSO-p6i4LFlpPP1kHTmYpkxZCcMQApU-YjJKH1MIk0Af5Pz0Lep_0zlLh3Jo0qIBKSKl0Z2NlTEE2zVGVBoOeQ0e1yT_9WVbBRRTrkPGgxJjo_5VOFywGHPDKXctXWjIK3paQJor-I0Pgxgo9OGmZNefp7COF5g76BFp_cVNEnvBW6FfWDnQOviS9MqB4D50aNuHKLrUmwkQJwXPjHkBkL1xtbBjs9O8NlNS6S3wI5_SsHOqkWrKPeOGoLC0VGv_Q9pMmVqa-LSHHB5JeLj4k2Nwi5QK3-f_WaOC9HlLTwbD6VokyacV2MTQQ2dJJ7WYIguLFNTlsB-YyKwKLgM%3D)
---
I’m fighting to restore strength and integrity to Michigan. _**I’m fighting for my wife Liz, our three boys, and every Michigan family who’s been left behind by failed leadership.**_ **And I’m fighting to make sure America remains the greatest force for freedom in the world.** If you believe that our best days are still ahead, and that the sacrifices of our veterans deserve to mean something, **[I’m asking you to join this mission with me.](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=89d6f29f2cd94e11a3fd441684ccf7ef&_e=A0aYg9r-BwaBXxM7ox5ScZxNmZHcLBJEXSQsDmT4r6ajgVuhGeBBSohmJCGrJ75ALal0yoRbNwh-v3JNA7va2Df6QSO-p6i4LFlpPP1kHTkkPTB3_xuSSNnCNcJyuWjHMg2CoGZd29LpP44Luwgvt4V_kYCEYl6j2cTR4nVLRwrI5LQK-npzgJNkZ2mkIMSNxJ42DdZD1e3jq67uco_DudauhaEArzgZlSEtd3-QRWD5k8bvpnG6yay_0dNBiBjyjMfk59Zu3OzAiIn0McqFn-trdd89BxVOy3Ew1iLvscPf8QEbMMqcvVhYXynXpS4BsZPuwXIxl-BnUBNbqNcf7uuXPM1Al7o93GZKA7BbIuI7q9aNdY7zxsPIQ3vFHOy56otvDmoq-lM0cPT-rJDuUxNdGuo8eh8naW9EM0M7saU%3D)** Because the fight for freedom doesn’t end when the uniform comes off.
---
[ **JOIN MY MISSION** ](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=89d6f29f2cd94e11a3fd441684ccf7ef&_e=A0aYg9r-BwaBXxM7ox5ScZxNmZHcLBJEXSQsDmT4r6ajgVuhGeBBSohmJCGrJ75ALal0yoRbNwh-v3JNA7va2Df6QSO-p6i4LFlpPP1kHTkf1a4rKJBtpJlOcP3xJq0XDUtOW6hDaP4hZ__dhNRfsh7d2WRPQ4u6QQPS3zQeL7veAh7AKK5bKpGr-dG-qIBHSUQQVZu36u6zNsgOmfMTXx7q4cAKkcDdXmWizb3xong4BrR1KiOWvf2ORr0hF5wGod28zUAmaiIIDpoDOAR7EIslQiFUKozzdsSRt0DXndjokRpxamTrViNSgilPXIf1Uf7D4EqaljYyCrBDjaWeeQ2J-tR3ul4OyUQOPUUbiO0vo6Rv9ljlMbd8LbBJoQsltgROlFemqNRXeplcHYsDOycCOcHOKNLwNrk_WmLfv-0%3D)
---
Your Friend, John James
---
[](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=89d6f29f2cd94e11a3fd441684ccf7ef&_e=A0aYg9r-BwaBXxM7ox5ScZxNmZHcLBJEXSQsDmT4r6ajgVuhGeBBSohmJCGrJ75ALal0yoRbNwh-v3JNA7va2Df6QSO-p6i4LFlpPP1kHTlaNexP3kaUE6OKGGWOpMRbUZieEO-EpGd4umRsYxnqoV0vUdUGcRg3BW-YqVj56q0iMYTr3TFBYLxvng_W22GhC3xf6sSaqMwDd1145Tf1erdiiCB5R2YgaU1L-gBvJetUrieGNicF8509uLvm0Km7SCnA7QtT4IJwzbSoCesZ8upK1BMDyNXxe0uH76N67IWzjVX6dhgPXz6G-KPKKDItsGEx2trnvtlC5CgYLpgYkWj_8ZMBk6NqsSHrCZ20p7aWKOzDcVULbtjEPH_hSK9gcX0rYd2lOHpwo8hfHoTKAt7bUSCdSRh6Tge62N66hAY%3D)

name: Autism Health
subject: Join Us for Our Upcoming Autism Support Group!
body:
|
---
| |
---
| |
## **Join Our Autism Support Group!**
---
|
---
| We invite you to our next **Autism Support Group** via Zoom — a compassionate space created for parents, caregivers, and professionals who support autistic individuals. Whether you’re just beginning this journey or have years of experience, this is a place where your voice, knowledge, and story are valued. This live group call provides an opportunity to:
* **Connect** with others who truly understand the challenges and joys of autism
* **Share experiences and strategies** that help children and adults thrive
* **Ask questions** and collaborate on solutions that matter
* **Discover resources** for biomedical care, communication, therapies, education, and advocacy
* **Build hope** through community — because none of us should navigate autism alone

Our support group is open to:
* Parents and caregivers of autistic children and adults
* Educators, therapists, practitioners, and healthcare professionals
* Anyone seeking a supportive, collaborative environment committed to improving the lives of those with autism

By coming together, we learn from one another, expand our support network, and create a stronger pathway for every individual we serve. If you’ve been searching for community — this is for you.
---
| [REGISTER HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=3f27f7688f&e=3a42edfdc4 "REGISTER HERE")
---
| We look forward to connecting with you, listening to your experiences, and providing encouragement, empowerment, and real solutions — together.
---
|
---
| **Black Friday Silent Auction — Shop with Purpose this Season!**
---
|
---
| Looking for the perfect holiday gift that makes a real difference? This year, shop with purpose in our **Black Friday Silent Auction** and treat your loved ones — or yourself — to meaningful, one-of-a-kind items that support a powerful mission. Every bid helps fund **Autism Health Inc.** , providing education, resources, and hope for families impacted by autism. Our **top auction items** include two exclusive collector’s pieces:
* A custom baseball bat signed by **Robert F. Kennedy Jr.**
* A custom baseball bat signed by **General Michael Flynn**

Other exciting items include:
* Various **Supplement Packages** designed for optimal wellness
* A **Private Health Coaching Session** with our President, **Tracy Slepcevic**
* A **Private Gun Range Experience** with **Steve Slepcevic** , Co-Founder of Autism Health

This is your chance to give a gift that inspires, empowers, and heals — while contributing to programs that make a real impact in the autism community. **Bidding is open and closes Nov 30th at 9 PM PST!**
Don’t miss your opportunity to shop for a cause and make this holiday season truly meaningful.
---
| [Visit our Silent Auction Page HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=ebcbf90d91&e=3a42edfdc4 "Visit our Silent Auction Page HERE")
---
|
---
| **Operation One Roof – One Love: A Mission of Hope in Jamaica**
---
| [ ](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=29dbf558a1&e=3a42edfdc4 "Roofers Needed for Hurricane Melissa Relief in Jamaica")
---
| When **Hurricane Melissa** struck Jamaica on October 28, 2025, with sustained winds exceeding 185 mph, it left catastrophic damage across the island — flattening homes, schools, and churches in its path. In the days before landfall, **Steve Slepcevic** , Co-Founder of **Autism Health Inc.** and Founder of **Strategic Response Partners** , arrived on the island to begin coordinating emergency logistics and humanitarian aid. What began as disaster response quickly evolved into **Operation One Roof – One Love** , a mission dedicated to rebuilding roofs, restoring communities, and bringing renewed hope to families who lost everything. Working alongside local tradespeople, government officials, and international relief partners — including **Samaritan’s Purse** and **World Central Kitchen** — Steve and his team are helping bring structure, supplies, and shelter back to Jamaica’s hardest-hit regions. But the need is immense, and the work has only just begun. **Operation One Roof – One Love is calling on roofing contractors, suppliers, and volunteers** to join the mission. Skilled roofers and trades professionals are urgently needed to help rebuild homes and schools, and donations of materials, tools, and funds are vital to sustain these efforts. This mission embodies the core of what Autism Health Inc. stands for — compassion, resilience, and the power of community service in action. We invite our extended family of supporters, sponsors, and partners to stand with us under **One Roof – One Love**. Every helping hand makes a difference. **Roofers & Contractors:** To volunteer or donate supplies, please reach out through [Strategic Response Partners.](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=ffbb5ebc03&e=3a42edfdc4)
Read the full story on [Roofing Contractor Magazine](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=061ad54721&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| [DONATE HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=3437eb2379&e=3a42edfdc4 "DONATE HERE")
---
|
---
|
## **Join Us for the Autism Health Summit in 2026**
---
|
---
| Kick off the season of gratitude with exclusive savings to the **Autism Health Summit 2026** — Join us April 24–26, 2026, at the beautiful Legacy Center Resort & Spa in San Diego, California. Hear leading experts, parents, practitioners, and advocates for three powerful days of research, therapies, connection, and stories of hope. Featured speakers include **Aaron Siri** , **Dr. Peter McCullough, and Dr. Dayan Goodenowe**! **Special November Pricing**
Take **$25 OFF** any ticket using promo code **BlackFriday** **General Admission:**
~~$345~~ → **$295**
PLUS **an extra $25 off** with the code **BlackFriday** **VIP Admission:**
~~$445~~ → **$395**
PLUS **an extra $25 off** with the code **BlackFriday** Legacy Center Resort & Spa, San Diego, CA
April 24–26, 2026 Don’t miss your chance to be part of this transformational weekend of education, empowerment, and community. Price increased on January 1st, so don't miss out on this great deal! We can’t wait to welcome you to San Diego!
---
| [REGISTER HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=6c68272d74&e=3a42edfdc4 "REGISTER HERE")
---
|
---
| **YOUR DONATIONS MAKE A DIFFERENCE!**
---
| Autism Health is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to educating individuals, families, and communities about autism spectrum disorder (ASD). Autism Health provides educational programs, workshops, events and resources tailored to meet the diverse needs of those impacted by autism and other neurological disorders.
---

clean_body: | | | | | Join Our Autism Support Group! | | We invite you to our next Autism Support Group via Zoom — a compassionate space created for parents, caregivers, and professionals who support autistic individuals. Whether you’re just beginning this journey or have years of experience, this is a place where your voice, knowledge, and story are valued. This live group call provides an opportunity to: Connect with others who truly understand the challenges and joys of autism Share experiences and strategies that help children and adults thrive Ask questions and collaborate on solutions that matter Discover resources for biomedical care, communication, therapies, education, and advocacy Build hope through community — because none of us should navigate autism alone Our support group is open to: Parents and caregivers of autistic children and adults Educators, therapists, practitioners, and healthcare professionals Anyone seeking a supportive, collaborative environment committed to improving the lives of those with autism By coming together, we learn from one another, expand our support network, and create a stronger pathway for every individual we serve. If you’ve been searching for community — this is for you. | "REGISTER HERE" | We look forward to connecting with you, listening to your experiences, and providing encouragement, empowerment, and real solutions — together. | | Black Friday Silent Auction — Shop with Purpose this Season! | | Looking for the perfect holiday gift that makes a real difference? This year, shop with purpose in our Black Friday Silent Auction and treat your loved ones — or yourself — to meaningful, one-of-a-kind items that support a powerful mission. Every bid helps fund Autism Health Inc. , providing education, resources, and hope for families impacted by autism. Our top auction items include two exclusive collector’s pieces: A custom baseball bat signed by Robert F. Kennedy Jr. A custom baseball bat signed by General Michael Flynn Other exciting items include: Various Supplement Packages designed for optimal wellness A Private Health Coaching Session with our President, Tracy Slepcevic A Private Gun Range Experience with Steve Slepcevic , Co-Founder of Autism Health This is your chance to give a gift that inspires, empowers, and heals — while contributing to programs that make a real impact in the autism community. Bidding is open and closes Nov 30th at 9 PM PST! Don’t miss your opportunity to shop for a cause and make this holiday season truly meaningful. | "Visit our Silent Auction Page HERE" | | Operation One Roof – One Love: A Mission of Hope in Jamaica | "Roofers Needed for Hurricane Melissa Relief in Jamaica" | When Hurricane Melissa struck Jamaica on October 28, 2025, with sustained winds exceeding 185 mph, it left catastrophic damage across the island — flattening homes, schools, and churches in its path. In the days before landfall, Steve Slepcevic , Co-Founder of Autism Health Inc. and Founder of Strategic Response Partners , arrived on the island to begin coordinating emergency logistics and humanitarian aid. What began as disaster response quickly evolved into Operation One Roof – One Love , a mission dedicated to rebuilding roofs, restoring communities, and bringing renewed hope to families who lost everything. Working alongside local tradespeople, government officials, and international relief partners — including Samaritan’s Purse and World Central Kitchen — Steve and his team are helping bring structure, supplies, and shelter back to Jamaica’s hardest-hit regions. But the need is immense, and the work has only just begun. Operation One Roof – One Love is calling on roofing contractors, suppliers, and volunteers to join the mission. Skilled roofers and trades professionals are urgently needed to help rebuild homes and schools, and donations of materials, tools, and funds are vital to sustain these efforts. This mission embodies the core of what Autism Health Inc. stands for — compassion, resilience, and the power of community service in action. We invite our extended family of supporters, sponsors, and partners to stand with us under One Roof – One Love. Every helping hand makes a difference. Roofers & Contractors: To volunteer or donate supplies, please reach out through Read the full story on | "DONATE HERE" | | Join Us for the Autism Health Summit in 2026 | | Kick off the season of gratitude with exclusive savings to the Autism Health Summit 2026 — Join us April 24–26, 2026, at the beautiful Legacy Center Resort & Spa in San Diego, California. Hear leading experts, parents, practitioners, and advocates for three powerful days of research, therapies, connection, and stories of hope. Featured speakers include Aaron Siri , Dr. Peter McCullough, and Dr. Dayan Goodenowe! Price increased on January 1st, so don't miss out on this great deal! We can’t wait to welcome you to San Diego! | "REGISTER HERE" | | YOUR DONATIONS MAKE A DIFFERENCE! | Autism Health is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to educating individuals, families, and communities about autism spectrum disorder (ASD). body:

| | | |
---
| |
---
| | friend, This weekend, I had the privilege of spending time with some of the brave men and women who’ve put it all on the line for this great country. From the [Claiborne County](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/vIYkRLvnwndsh3Ajz8ju4ScVQL7v07QFhSeTaZ8oSEZ5m3Wd-7nLZKc_Unpn36Yr9tC_4R2Go_8-CBSDyjelzzvONZIF3C5HxC5ATPoTDB4C-GizA6ViuxkNCP0nVd2w4UPWrSRx2630OOV0-Pa9HPRRoeY2cCLBRPGaH487-q0HKuMpG6zwLK1AVb4uCt_5M5y2kwFkPtvb8eKUrKmHYW8ZA1165DE1nhDsAUe1a6fOt2nL_g2qlGYIQWuXkIZ5POoA4NWVrMwYKAb_k5xpGKqJ9rH1nKDBFaNzoSLEgHpcZsmPj_nTtRtyh_qAcPeImaiNnWAnH9Nc-zk2bLz0OTVsz5oRkhHvTWYedK9fRCv4T8w88qJCL3jnA0JSB8zHyNNYB1-iDuYwYIjZPP0TA8XaEQEXnT0wXCEybgoQRRETSXs6OzlEDOZM4m0b7gY/5xCvroo0dD93t3rM5oEQThppqeBXtAJy/14) Veterans Day program to a ceremony at [Lyons View Cemetery](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/ByBPafJXbp19E18AnrSFtwbtm-ieg3WAJAMnxFy-9R_6fEG8Zl2Rrf7NKYUC_t6dphiWTooIHyMF9-DIs2rt-UnubsrcWVGQfQ_U1TJ3uH2-mQjYB9zuBbUvRn_s7fd9yWh5JnjrFzc-09P2uMAQzPc-cVkt9YoKGkcVkO1jRU-lpdkoQwSgiw_QUO_mKJ9cyk3J9ryBscoHWwElGkBjgF7JBkU6hFF2bKWvxokyhQthNWRhXDqaHEZz5Cl5LlyqXXVeHU7Q8-EuGFGf9g6wtb8ASTToQ79fwKmvWqckdoI9YZm6C7c2RB22b6K7CpG2wCuPNewtpUaUcOx7aCU5OlzUquU-wzosjgIBfRZpfVHFDADFuqMXU7b2VZNDSe2NGr6qH6bJaRsI_KUPtqE-x16Qfua5uV4ZMx1jpzb2YqV--C271PBs5soE8n8Aey4/Ys5pFIQOuyibTWYSMQHehPRpuOayGkfD/14), it was an honor to stand among folks who’ve sacrificed so much for their countrymen—and their commitment reminds us of what real service looks like.
